&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Lightning, Tools, Cpu } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { circuitData, distributionBoxes } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Electricity: Lightning, Battery: Tools, Gauge: Cpu }
const selectedBox = ref('')
const circuits = ref([...circuitData])
const boxes = ref([...distributionBoxes])

const filteredCircuits = computed(() =&gt; {
  if (!selectedBox.value) return circuits.value
  return circuits.value.filter(c =&gt; c.boxId === selectedBox.value)
})

const totalPower = computed(() =&gt; {
  return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&gt; sum + c.power, 0) / 1000
})

const totalEnergy = computed(() =&gt; {
  return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&gt; sum + c.energy, 0)
})

const avgPowerFactor = computed(() =&gt; {
  const count = filteredCircuits.value.length
  if (count === 0) return 0
  return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&gt; sum + c.powerFactor, 0) / count
})

const getBoxName = (boxId) =&gt; {
  const box = boxes.value.find(b =&gt; b.id === boxId)
  return box ? box.name : boxId
}

const getPowerFactorTag = (pf) =&gt; {
  if (pf &gt;= 0.95) return 'success'
  if (pf &gt;= 0.9) return 'warning'
  return 'danger'
}

const getPowerFactorText = (pf) =&gt; {
  if (pf &gt;= 0.95) return '优秀'
  if (pf &gt;= 0.9) return '良好'
  return '需优化'
}
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;style scoped&gt;
.circuit-stats {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.stat-card {
  flex: 1;
  background: #fff;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 15px;
}

  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 24px;
}

.stat-info {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #333;
}

  font-size: 14px;
  color: #666;
}

  width: 200px;
}

.data-table {
  width: 100%;
}

          &lt;template #prefix&gt;
            &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt;
          &lt;/template&gt;
        &lt;/el-input&gt;

      &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredGroups&quot; border class=&quot;group-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt;

        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;

        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;creator&quot; label=&quot;创建人&quot; width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;remark&quot; label=&quot;备注&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;300&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; fixed=&quot;right&quot;&gt;
          &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchOn(row)&quot;&gt;全开&lt;/el-button&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchOff(row)&quot;&gt;全关&lt;/el-button&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;warning&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;修改&lt;/el-button&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;/template&gt;
        &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
      &lt;/el-table&gt;

      &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-pagination
          v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot;
          v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot;
          :total=&quot;total&quot;
          :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&quot;
          layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, sizes, total&quot;
        &gt;&lt;/el-pagination&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;

    &lt;!-- 新增/编辑分组对话框 --&gt;
    &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;dialogTitle&quot; v-model=&quot;showDialog&quot; width=&quot;900px&quot; :close-on-click-modal=&quot;false&quot;&gt;
      &lt;el-form :model=&quot;groupForm&quot; :rules=&quot;groupRules&quot; ref=&quot;groupFormRef&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-col :span=&quot;8&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;分组名称&quot; prop=&quot;groupName&quot;&gt;
              &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;groupForm.groupName&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入分组名称&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt;
            &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
          &lt;/el-col&gt;

                &lt;el-option label=&quot;先导路&quot; value=&quot;3&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt;
                &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋&quot; value=&quot;4&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt;
                &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天2栋&quot; value=&quot;5&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt;
              &lt;/el-select&gt;
            &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
          &lt;/el-col&gt;
          &lt;el-col :span=&quot;8&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;分组备注&quot; prop=&quot;remark&quot;&gt;
              &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;groupForm.remark&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入分组备注&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt;
            &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
          &lt;/el-col&gt;
        &lt;/el-row&gt;
        
        &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt;
            &lt;div class=&quot;circuit-select&quot;&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;select-header&quot;&gt;
                &lt;span class=&quot;select-title&quot;&gt;可选回路&lt;/span&gt;
                &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;leftSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入回路名称&quot; style=&quot;width: 180px; margin-right: 10px;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt;
                &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleLeftSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt;
                &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleLeftReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt;
              &lt;/div&gt;
              &lt;el-table :data=&quot;leftCircuits&quot; border style=&quot;margin-top: 10px;&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleLeftSelection&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;

                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;centralControl&quot; label=&quot;所属集控&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
              &lt;/el-table&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-small&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-pagination
                  :current-page=&quot;leftPage&quot;
                  :page-size=&quot;10&quot;
                  :total=&quot;leftTotal&quot;
                  layout=&quot;prev, pager, next&quot;
                  @current-change=&quot;handleLeftPageChange&quot;
                &gt;&lt;/el-pagination&gt;
              &lt;/div&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;/el-col&gt;
          &lt;el-col :span=&quot;2&quot; class=&quot;transfer-buttons&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; icon=&quot;ArrowRight&quot; circle @click=&quot;handleMoveRight&quot; :disabled=&quot;leftSelected.length === 0&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-button&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; icon=&quot;ArrowLeft&quot; circle @click=&quot;handleMoveLeft&quot; :disabled=&quot;rightSelected.length === 0&quot; style=&quot;margin-top: 10px;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;/el-col&gt;
          &lt;el-col :span=&quot;10&quot;&gt;
            &lt;div class=&quot;circuit-select&quot;&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;select-header&quot;&gt;
                &lt;span class=&quot;select-title&quot;&gt;已选回路&lt;/span&gt;
                &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;rightSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入回路名称&quot; style=&quot;width: 180px; margin-right: 10px;&quot; disabled&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt;
              &lt;/div&gt;
              &lt;el-table :data=&quot;selectedCircuits&quot; border style=&quot;margin-top: 10px;&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleRightSelection&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;circuitName&quot; label=&quot;回路名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;centralControl&quot; label=&quot;所属集控&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
              &lt;/el-table&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;empty-tip&quot; v-if=&quot;selectedCircuits.length === 0&quot;&gt;
                暂无数据
              &lt;/div&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;/el-col&gt;
        &lt;/el-row&gt;
      &lt;/el-form&gt;
      
      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleDialogClose&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSubmit&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/template&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Search, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'

const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(15)
const total = ref(2)
const searchKeyword = ref('')
const showDialog = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const leftPage = ref(1)
const leftTotal = ref(40)
const leftSearch = ref('')
const rightSearch = ref('')
const selectedRows = ref([])
const leftSelected = ref([])
const rightSelected = ref([])
const groupFormRef = ref(null)

const groupForm = ref({
  groupName: '',
  level: '',
  remark: ''
})

const groupRules = {
  groupName: [{ required: true, message: '请输入分组名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  level: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属层级', trigger: 'change' }]
}

const dialogTitle = computed(() =&gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑' : '新增')

const circuitGroups = ref([
  {
    no: 1,
    groupName: '隔一亮一组',
    deviceCount: 8,
    creator: 'test08',
    remark: '',
    circuits: [
      { no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' },
      { no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' },
      { no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', centralControl: '测试128M' },
      { no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', centralControl: '测试128M' },
      { no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', centralControl: '测试128M' },
      { no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', centralControl: '测试128M' },
      { no: 7, circuitName: '回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' },
      { no: 8, circuitName: '回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' }
    ]
  },
  {
    no: 2,
    groupName: '隔一亮一B组',
    deviceCount: 0,
    creator: 'admin',
    remark: '不可更改',
    circuits: []
  }
])

const selectedCircuits = ref([])

const allCircuits = ref([
  { no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  { no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  { no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  { no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  { no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  { no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  { no: 7, circuitName: '回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  { no: 8, circuitName: '回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  { no: 9, circuitName: '回路3', centralControl: '先导路集控1' },
  { no: 10, circuitName: '回路4', centralControl: '先导路集控1' },
  { no: 11, circuitName: '回路5', centralControl: '先导路集控2' },
  { no: 12, circuitName: '回路6', centralControl: '先导路集控2' }
])

const leftCircuits = computed(() =&gt; {
  const start = (leftPage.value - 1) * 10
  const end = start + 10
  let result = allCircuits.value.filter(c =&gt; 
    !selectedCircuits.value.some(sc =&gt; sc.no === c.no)
  )
  if (leftSearch.value) {
    result = result.filter(c =&gt; 
      c.circuitName.includes(leftSearch.value) || 
      c.centralControl.includes(leftSearch.value)
    )
  }
  return result.slice(start, end)
})

const filteredGroups = computed(() =&gt; {
  if (!searchKeyword.value) return circuitGroups.value
  return circuitGroups.value.filter(g =&gt; g.groupName.includes(searchKeyword.value))
})

const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; {
  selectedRows.value = selection
}

const handleLeftSelection = (selection) =&gt; {
  leftSelected.value = selection
}

const handleRightSelection = (selection) =&gt; {
  rightSelected.value = selection
}

const handleSearch = () =&gt; {
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const handleReset = () =&gt; {
  searchKeyword.value = ''
  ElMessage.info('已重置')
}

const handleAdd = () =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  selectedCircuits.value = []
  groupForm.value = {
    groupName: '',
    level: '',
    remark: ''
  }
  showDialog.value = true
}

const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  groupForm.value = {
    groupName: row.groupName,
    level: '1',
    remark: row.remark
  }
  selectedCircuits.value = [...row.circuits]
  showDialog.value = true
}

const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要删除分组【${row.groupName}】吗？`,
    '删除确认',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    circuitGroups.value = circuitGroups.value.filter(g =&gt; g.no !== row.no)
    total.value--
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  }).catch(() =&gt; {})
}

const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; {
  if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择要删除的分组')
    return
  }
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个分组吗？`,
    '批量删除确认',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    const ids = selectedRows.value.map(r =&gt; r.no)
    circuitGroups.value = circuitGroups.value.filter(g =&gt; !ids.includes(g.no))
    total.value -= selectedRows.value.length
    selectedRows.value = []
    ElMessage.success('批量删除成功')
  }).catch(() =&gt; {})
}

const handleBatchOn = (row) =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要对分组【${row.groupName}】内的所有回路执行&quot;全开&quot;操作吗？`,
    '批量控制',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    ElMessage.success(`分组【${row.groupName}】内的 ${row.deviceCount} 个回路已全部开启`)
  }).catch(() =&gt; {})
}

const handleBatchOff = (row) =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要对分组【${row.groupName}】内的所有回路执行&quot;全关&quot;操作吗？`,
    '批量控制',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    ElMessage.success(`分组【${row.groupName}】内的 ${row.deviceCount} 个回路已全部关闭`)
  }).catch(() =&gt; {})
}

const handleMoveRight = () =&gt; {
  if (leftSelected.value.length === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择要添加的回路')
    return
  }
  leftSelected.value.forEach(circuit =&gt; {
    if (!selectedCircuits.value.some(c =&gt; c.no === circuit.no)) {
      selectedCircuits.value.push(circuit)
    }
  })
  leftSelected.value = []
  ElMessage.success('已添加选中的回路')
}

const handleMoveLeft = () =&gt; {
  if (rightSelected.value.length === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择要移除的回路')
    return
  }
  const ids = rightSelected.value.map(c =&gt; c.no)
  selectedCircuits.value = selectedCircuits.value.filter(c =&gt; !ids.includes(c.no))
  rightSelected.value = []
  ElMessage.success('已移除选中的回路')
}

const handleLeftSearch = () =&gt; {
  leftPage.value = 1
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const handleLeftReset = () =&gt; {
  leftSearch.value = ''
  leftPage.value = 1
  ElMessage.info('已重置')
}

const handleLeftPageChange = (page) =&gt; {
  leftPage.value = page
}

const handleDialogClose = () =&gt; {
  showDialog.value = false
  groupFormRef.value?.resetFields()
}

const handleSubmit = () =&gt; {
  groupFormRef.value?.validate((valid) =&gt; {
    if (valid) {
      if (isEdit.value) {
        const index = circuitGroups.value.findIndex(g =&gt; g.no === groupForm.value.no)
        if (index !== -1) {
          circuitGroups.value[index].groupName = groupForm.value.groupName
          circuitGroups.value[index].remark = groupForm.value.remark
          circuitGroups.value[index].deviceCount = selectedCircuits.value.length
          circuitGroups.value[index].circuits = [...selectedCircuits.value]
        }
        ElMessage.success('修改成功')
      } else {
        const newNo = circuitGroups.value.length &gt; 0 ? Math.max(...circuitGroups.value.map(g =&gt; g.no)) + 1 : 1
        circuitGroups.value.push({
          no: newNo,
          groupName: groupForm.value.groupName,
          deviceCount: selectedCircuits.value.length,
          creator: '管理员',
          remark: groupForm.value.remark,
          circuits: [...selectedCircuits.value]
        })
        total.value++
        ElMessage.success('新增成功')
      }
      showDialog.value = false
      groupFormRef.value?.resetFields()
    }
  })
}
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;style scoped&gt;
.page-container {

  font-weight: 500;
  color: #303133;
  min-width: 60px;
}

.transfer-buttons {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}

.pagination-small {
  margin-top: 10px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
}

.empty-tip {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 40px;
  color: #909399;
}
&lt;/style&gt;
</div>

              &lt;/el-tag&gt;

    &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; :title=&quot;isEdit ? '编辑配电柜' : '新增配电柜'&quot; width=&quot;700px&quot;&gt;
      &lt;el-form :model=&quot;form&quot; :rules=&quot;rules&quot; ref=&quot;formRef&quot; label-width=&quot;120px&quot;&gt;

          &lt;/el-select&gt;

              {{ currentBox.status === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }}
            &lt;/el-tag&gt;
          &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
          &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;健康状态&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.health === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
              {{ currentBox.health === 'normal' ? '正常' : '故障' }}
            &lt;/el-tag&gt;
          &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
          &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;温度&quot;&gt;{{ currentBox.temperature }}℃&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
          &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;湿度&quot;&gt;{{ currentBox.humidity }}%&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
        &lt;/el-descriptions&gt;

        &lt;el-tabs v-model=&quot;detailTab&quot; class=&quot;detail-tabs&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;供电参数&quot; name=&quot;power&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;3&quot; border&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;A相电压&quot;&gt;220V&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;B相电压&quot;&gt;221V&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;C相电压&quot;&gt;219V&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;A相电流&quot;&gt;15.2A&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;B相电流&quot;&gt;14.8A&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;C相电流&quot;&gt;15.5A&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;有功功率&quot;&gt;10.2kW&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;无功功率&quot;&gt;2.1kVar&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;功率因数&quot;&gt;0.95&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
            &lt;/el-descriptions&gt;
          &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt;
          &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;关联线路&quot; name=&quot;circuits&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-table :data=&quot;relatedCircuits&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; border&gt;
              &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt;
              &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;线路名称&quot; /&gt;
              &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;
                &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt;
                  &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.status === 'on' ? 'success' : 'warning'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                    {{ row.status === 'on' ? '合闸' : '分闸' }}
                  &lt;/el-tag&gt;
                &lt;/template&gt;
              &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
              &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;power&quot; label=&quot;功率(kW)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;/el-table&gt;
          &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt;
          &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;环境监测&quot; name=&quot;environment&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; border&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;门锁状态&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.lockStatus === 'locked' ? 'success' : 'warning'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                  {{ currentBox.lockStatus === 'locked' ? '锁定' : '解锁' }}
                &lt;/el-tag&gt;
              &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;门磁状态&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.magneticStatus === 'closed' ? 'success' : 'warning'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                  {{ currentBox.magneticStatus === 'closed' ? '关闭' : '打开' }}
                &lt;/el-tag&gt;
              &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;烟感状态&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.smokeStatus === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                  {{ currentBox.smokeStatus === 'normal' ? '正常' : '报警' }}
                &lt;/el-tag&gt;
              &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
              &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;水浸状态&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.waterStatus === 'dry' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                  {{ currentBox.waterStatus === 'dry' ? '干燥' : '水浸' }}
                &lt;/el-tag&gt;
              &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
            &lt;/el-descriptions&gt;
          &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt;
        &lt;/el-tabs&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showDetailDialog = false&quot;&gt;关闭&lt;/el-button&gt;

    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
import { Search, Plus, Refresh, Delete } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'

const searchText = ref('')
const showAddDialog = ref(false)
const showDetailDialog = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const formRef = ref(null)
const detailTab = ref('power')
const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(15)
const total = ref(9)
const selectedRows = ref([])
const currentBox = ref(null)

const filters = reactive({
  search: '',
  status: '',
  health: ''
})

const form = reactive({
  code: '',
  name: '',
  location: '',
  longitude: '',
  latitude: '',
  hierarchy: '',
  capacity: '',
  description: ''
})

const rules = {
  code: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜编号', trigger: 'blur' }],
  name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  location: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜位置', trigger: 'blur' }]
}

const defaultProps = {
  children: 'children',
  label: 'label'
}

const treeData = ref([
  {
    id: 1,
    label: '长沙',
    children: [
      { 
        id: 11, 
        label: '岳麓区',
        children: [
          { id: 111, label: '先导路' },
          { id: 112, label: '力唯中天1栋' }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
])

const boxes = ref([
  { id: 1, no: 1, code: 'PDG-XDL-001', name: '先导路1号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-先导路与麓谷大道交汇处', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 28, humidity: 65, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' },
  { id: 2, no: 2, code: 'PDG-XDL-002', name: '先导路2号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-先导路中段', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 30, humidity: 60, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' },
  { id: 3, no: 3, code: 'PDG-LWZT-001', name: '力唯中天1栋1号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋地下车库', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 25, humidity: 70, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' },
  { id: 4, no: 4, code: 'PDG-LWZT-002', name: '力唯中天1栋2号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋A座旁', status: 'offline', health: 'fault', temperature: '-', humidity: '-', lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' }
])

const relatedCircuits = ref([
  { no: 1, name: '主照明回路1', status: 'on', power: 3.5 },
  { no: 2, name: '主照明回路2', status: 'on', power: 2.8 },
  { no: 3, name: '景观照明回路', status: 'off', power: 0 },
  { no: 4, name: '应急照明回路', status: 'on', power: 1.2 }
])

const filteredBoxes = computed(() =&gt; {
  let result = boxes.value
  if (filters.search) {
    result = result.filter(b =&gt; b.code.includes(filters.search) || b.name.includes(filters.search))
  }
  if (filters.status) {
    result = result.filter(b =&gt; b.status === filters.status)
  }
  if (filters.health) {
    result = result.filter(b =&gt; b.health === filters.health)
  }
  return result
})

const handleCheckChange = (data, checked) =&gt; {
  console.log('checked:', data, checked)
}

const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; {
  selectedRows.value = selection
}

const searchBoxes = () =&gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const resetFilters = () =&gt; {
  Object.assign(filters, { search: '', status: '', health: '' })
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const refreshData = () =&gt; {
  ElMessage.success('数据已刷新')
}

const viewDetail = (row) =&gt; {
  currentBox.value = row
  detailTab.value = 'power'
  showDetailDialog.value = true
}

const editBox = (row) =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  Object.assign(form, row)
  showAddDialog.value = true
}

const deleteBox = (row) =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除配电柜&quot;${row.name}&quot;吗？`, '提示', {
    confirmButtonText: '确定',
    cancelButtonText: '取消',
    type: 'warning'
  }).then(() =&gt; {
    const index = boxes.value.findIndex(b =&gt; b.id === row.id)
    if (index &gt; -1) {
      boxes.value.splice(index, 1)
      total.value--
      ElMessage.success('删除成功')
    }
  }).catch(() =&gt; {})
}

const batchDelete = () =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除选中的${selectedRows.value.length}个配电柜吗？`, '提示', {
    confirmButtonText: '确定',
    cancelButtonText: '取消',
    type: 'warning'
  }).then(() =&gt; {
    const selectedIds = selectedRows.value.map(b =&gt; b.id)
    boxes.value = boxes.value.filter(b =&gt; !selectedIds.includes(b.id))
    total.value = boxes.value.length
    selectedRows.value = []
    ElMessage.success('批量删除成功')
  }).catch(() =&gt; {})
}

const submitForm = () =&gt; {
  formRef.value.validate((valid) =&gt; {
    if (valid) {
      if (isEdit.value) {
        ElMessage.success('配电柜修改成功')
      } else {
        const newId = Math.max(...boxes.value.map(b =&gt; b.id)) + 1
        boxes.value.push({
          id: newId,
          no: boxes.value.length + 1,
          ...form,
          status: 'online',
          health: 'normal',
          temperature: '-',
          humidity: '-',
          lockStatus: 'locked',
          magneticStatus: 'closed',
          smokeStatus: 'normal',
          waterStatus: 'dry'
        })
        total.value++
        ElMessage.success('配电柜添加成功')
      }
      showAddDialog.value = false
    }
  })
}
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;style scoped&gt;
.page-container {
  padding: 20px;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.main-content {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
}

.left-sidebar {
  width: 200px;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  padding: 15px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.sidebar-header {
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.right-content {
  flex: 1;
}

.page-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  padding-bottom: 15px;

import { ref } from 'vue'

            &gt;&lt;/el-pagination&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt;
        &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;组播分组&quot; name=&quot;multicast&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;empty-tip&quot;&gt;功能开发中...&lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt;
      &lt;/el-tabs&gt;

    &lt;!-- 新增/编辑灯控绑定对话框 --&gt;
    &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;dialogTitle&quot; v-model=&quot;showDialog&quot; width=&quot;900px&quot; :close-on-click-modal=&quot;false&quot;&gt;

        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;所属集控&quot; prop=&quot;centralControl&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.centralControl&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;展厅集控&quot; value=&quot;ZTJK&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;测试128M&quot; value=&quot;CS128M&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;先导路集控1&quot; value=&quot;XDLJK1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;先导路集控2&quot; value=&quot;XDLJK2&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt;
          &lt;/el-select&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        
        &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-col :span=&quot;11&quot;&gt;
            &lt;div class=&quot;table-select&quot;&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;select-header&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;leftSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入IMEI号或名称&quot; style=&quot;width: 200px; margin-right: 10px;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt;
                &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleLeftSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt;
                &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleLeftReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt;
              &lt;/div&gt;
              &lt;el-table :data=&quot;leftTableData&quot; border style=&quot;margin-top: 10px;&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleLeftSelection&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;imei&quot; label=&quot;IMEI号&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampControlName&quot; label=&quot;灯控名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampPoleName&quot; label=&quot;灯杆名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
              &lt;/el-table&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;empty-tip&quot; v-if=&quot;leftTableData.length === 0&quot;&gt;暂无数据&lt;/div&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;/el-col&gt;
          &lt;el-col :span=&quot;2&quot; class=&quot;transfer-buttons&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; icon=&quot;ArrowRight&quot; circle @click=&quot;handleMoveRight&quot; :disabled=&quot;leftSelected.length === 0&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-button&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; icon=&quot;ArrowLeft&quot; circle @click=&quot;handleMoveLeft&quot; :disabled=&quot;rightSelected.length === 0&quot; style=&quot;margin-top: 10px;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;/el-col&gt;
          &lt;el-col :span=&quot;11&quot;&gt;
            &lt;div class=&quot;table-select&quot;&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;select-header&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;rightSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入IMEI号或名称&quot; style=&quot;width: 200px; margin-right: 10px;&quot; disabled&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt;
                &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; disabled&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt;
                &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; disabled&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt;
              &lt;/div&gt;
              &lt;el-table :data=&quot;selectedLampControls&quot; border style=&quot;margin-top: 10px;&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleRightSelection&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;imei&quot; label=&quot;IMEI号&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampControlName&quot; label=&quot;灯控名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
                &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampPoleName&quot; label=&quot;灯杆名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
              &lt;/el-table&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;empty-tip&quot; v-if=&quot;selectedLampControls.length === 0&quot;&gt;暂无数据&lt;/div&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;/el-col&gt;
        &lt;/el-row&gt;
      &lt;/el-form&gt;
      
      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleDialogClose&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSubmit&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/template&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Search, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'

const activeTab = ref('lamp')
const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(15)
const total = ref(1)
const searchKeyword = ref('')
const showDialog = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const leftSearch = ref('')
const rightSearch = ref('')
const selectedRows = ref([])
const leftSelected = ref([])
const rightSelected = ref([])
const formRef = ref(null)

const formData = ref({
  centralControl: ''
})

const formRules = {
  centralControl: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属集控', trigger: 'change' }]
}

const dialogTitle = computed(() =&gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑灯控绑定' : '新增灯控绑定')

const bindData = ref([
  {
    no: 1,
    centralControlName: '展厅集控',
    centralControlNo: 'ZTJK',
    bindCount: 2,
    lampControls: [
      { no: 1, imei: '867892010000001', lampControlName: '灯控1', lampPoleName: '灯杆001' },
      { no: 2, imei: '867892010000002', lampControlName: '灯控2', lampPoleName: '灯杆002' }
    ]
  }
])

const selectedLampControls = ref([])

const allLampControls = ref([
  { no: 1, imei: '867892010000001', lampControlName: '灯控1', lampPoleName: '灯杆001' },
  { no: 2, imei: '867892010000002', lampControlName: '灯控2', lampPoleName: '灯杆002' },
  { no: 3, imei: '867892010000003', lampControlName: '灯控3', lampPoleName: '灯杆003' },
  { no: 4, imei: '867892010000004', lampControlName: '灯控4', lampPoleName: '灯杆004' },
  { no: 5, imei: '867892010000005', lampControlName: '灯控5', lampPoleName: '灯杆005' },
  { no: 6, imei: '867892010000006', lampControlName: '灯控6', lampPoleName: '灯杆006' }
])

const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; {
  if (!searchKeyword.value) return bindData.value
  return bindData.value.filter(item =&gt; 
    item.centralControlName.includes(searchKeyword.value) || 
    item.centralControlNo.includes(searchKeyword.value)
  )
})

const leftTableData = computed(() =&gt; {
  let result = allLampControls.value.filter(lc =&gt; 
    !selectedLampControls.value.some(slc =&gt; slc.imei === lc.imei)
  )
  if (leftSearch.value) {
    result = result.filter(lc =&gt; 
      lc.imei.includes(leftSearch.value) || 
      lc.lampControlName.includes(leftSearch.value) ||
      lc.lampPoleName.includes(leftSearch.value)
    )
  }
  return result
})

const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; {
  selectedRows.value = selection
}

const handleLeftSelection = (selection) =&gt; {
  leftSelected.value = selection
}

const handleRightSelection = (selection) =&gt; {
  rightSelected.value = selection
}

const handleSearch = () =&gt; {
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const handleReset = () =&gt; {
  searchKeyword.value = ''
  ElMessage.info('已重置')
}

const handleAdd = () =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  selectedLampControls.value = []
  formData.value = {
    centralControl: ''
  }
  showDialog.value = true
}

const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  formData.value = {
    centralControl: row.centralControlNo
  }
  selectedLampControls.value = [...row.lampControls]
  showDialog.value = true
}

const handleUnbind = (row) =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要对集控【${row.centralControlName}】执行&quot;解绑&quot;操作吗？`,
    '解绑确认',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no)
    if (index !== -1) {
      bindData.value[index].bindCount = 0
      bindData.value[index].lampControls = []
    }
    ElMessage.success('解绑成功')
  }).catch(() =&gt; {})
}

const handleBatchUnbind = () =&gt; {
  if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择要解绑的集控')
    return
  }
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要对选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个集控执行&quot;解绑&quot;操作吗？`,
    '批量解绑确认',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; {
      const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no)
      if (index !== -1) {
        bindData.value[index].bindCount = 0
        bindData.value[index].lampControls = []
      }
    })
    selectedRows.value = []
    ElMessage.success('批量解绑成功')
  }).catch(() =&gt; {})
}

const handleMoveRight = () =&gt; {
  if (leftSelected.value.length === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择要添加的灯控')
    return
  }
  leftSelected.value.forEach(lc =&gt; {
    if (!selectedLampControls.value.some(slc =&gt; slc.imei === lc.imei)) {
      selectedLampControls.value.push(lc)
    }
  })
  leftSelected.value = []
  ElMessage.success('已添加选中的灯控')
}

const handleMoveLeft = () =&gt; {
  if (rightSelected.value.length === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择要移除的灯控')
    return
  }
  const imeis = rightSelected.value.map(lc =&gt; lc.imei)
  selectedLampControls.value = selectedLampControls.value.filter(lc =&gt; !imeis.includes(lc.imei))
  rightSelected.value = []
  ElMessage.success('已移除选中的灯控')
}

const handleLeftSearch = () =&gt; {
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const handleLeftReset = () =&gt; {
  leftSearch.value = ''
  ElMessage.info('已重置')
}

const handleDialogClose = () =&gt; {
  showDialog.value = false
  formRef.value?.resetFields()
}

const handleSubmit = () =&gt; {
  formRef.value?.validate((valid) =&gt; {
    if (valid) {
      if (isEdit.value) {
        const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.centralControlNo === formData.value.centralControl)
        if (index !== -1) {
          bindData.value[index].bindCount = selectedLampControls.value.length
          bindData.value[index].lampControls = [...selectedLampControls.value]
        }
        ElMessage.success('修改成功')
      } else {
        const centralControlMap = {
          'ZTJK': '展厅集控',
          'CS128M': '测试128M',
          'XDLJK1': '先导路集控1',
          'XDLJK2': '先导路集控2'
        }
        const newNo = bindData.value.length &gt; 0 ? Math.max(...bindData.value.map(item =&gt; item.no)) + 1 : 1
        bindData.value.push({
          no: newNo,
          centralControlName: centralControlMap[formData.value.centralControl] || formData.value.centralControl,
          centralControlNo: formData.value.centralControl,
          bindCount: selectedLampControls.value.length,
          lampControls: [...selectedLampControls.value]
        })
        total.value++
        ElMessage.success('新增成功')
      }
      showDialog.value = false
      formRef.value?.resetFields()
    }
  })
}
&lt;/script&gt;

          &lt;/el-col&gt;
        &lt;/el-row&gt;

          &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.remark&quot; type=&quot;textarea&quot; :rows=&quot;2&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入备注&quot; maxlength=&quot;20&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
      &lt;/el-form&gt;
      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitForm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/template&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;

&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'

const showAddDialog = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const formRef = ref(null)
const cabinetSearch = ref('')
const selectedCabinet = ref(null)

const cabinets = ref([
  { id: 1, name: '先导路1号配电柜', code: 'PDG-XDL-001' },
  { id: 2, name: '先导路2号配电柜', code: 'PDG-XDL-002' },
  { id: 3, name: '力唯中天1栋1号配电柜', code: 'PDG-LWZT-001' },
  { id: 4, name: '力唯中天1栋2号配电柜', code: 'PDG-LWZT-002' }
])

const lines = ref([
  { id: 1, cabinetId: 1, name: '断路器', code: 'AL10', lampCount: 0, parentLine: '', controlType: 'breaker', phaseType: 'single', refCurrent: '', ratedPower: '', currentMax: '', currentMin: '', remark: '' }
])

const form = reactive({
  cabinetId: '',
  parentLine: '',
  controlType: '',
  code: '',
  name: '',
  phaseType: '',
  refCurrent: '',
  ratedPower: '',
  currentMax: '',
  currentMin: '',
  remark: ''
})

const rules = {
  cabinetId: [{ required: true, message: '请选择配电柜名称', trigger: 'change' }],
  parentLine: [{ required: true, message: '请选择上级线路', trigger: 'change' }],
  controlType: [{ required: true, message: '请选择控制类型', trigger: 'change' }],
  code: [{ required: true, message: '请输入线路编号', trigger: 'blur' }],
  name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入线路名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  phaseType: [{ required: true, message: '请选择单三相', trigger: 'change' }]
}

const filteredCabinets = computed(() =&gt; {
  if (!cabinetSearch.value) return cabinets.value
  return cabinets.value.filter(c =&gt; c.name.includes(cabinetSearch.value) || c.code.includes(cabinetSearch.value))
})

const filteredLines = computed(() =&gt; {
  if (!selectedCabinet.value) return lines.value
  return lines.value.filter(l =&gt; l.cabinetId === selectedCabinet.value.id)
})

const selectCabinet = (cabinet) =&gt; {
  selectedCabinet.value = cabinet
}

const resetForm = () =&gt; {
  Object.assign(form, {
    cabinetId: '',
    parentLine: '',
    controlType: '',
    code: '',
    name: '',
    phaseType: '',
    refCurrent: '',
    ratedPower: '',
    currentMax: '',
    currentMin: '',
    remark: ''
  })
}

const editLine = (row) =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  Object.assign(form, row)
  showAddDialog.value = true
}

const submitForm = () =&gt; {
  formRef.value.validate((valid) =&gt; {
    if (valid) {
      if (isEdit.value) {
        const index = lines.value.findIndex(l =&gt; l.id === form.id)
        if (index &gt; -1) {
          lines.value[index] = { ...lines.value[index], ...form }
        }
        ElMessage.success('修改成功')
      } else {
        const newId = Math.max(...lines.value.map(l =&gt; l.id), 0) + 1
        lines.value.push({
          id: newId,
          ...form,
          lampCount: 0
        })
        ElMessage.success('新增成功')
      }
      showAddDialog.value = false
      isEdit.value = false
      resetForm()
    }
  })
}
&lt;/script&gt;

  <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;电压电流负荷展示&lt;/div&gt;

        &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;timeRange&quot; placeholder=&quot;时间范围&quot; class=&quot;range-select&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-option label=&quot;今日&quot; value=&quot;today&quot; /&gt;

        &lt;div class=&quot;card-trend positive&quot;&gt;

        &lt;/div&gt;

        &lt;div class=&quot;card-value&quot;&gt;{{ statistics.energy }} kWh&lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;card-trend positive&quot;&gt;
          &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.TrendingUp&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;span&gt;+8.3%&lt;/span&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;summary-card&quot;&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;峰值负荷&lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;card-value&quot;&gt;{{ statistics.peakLoad.toFixed(1) }} A&lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;card-trend negative&quot;&gt;
          &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.TrendingDown&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;span&gt;-5.2%&lt;/span&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;chart-section&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;chart-card&quot;&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;chart-header&quot;&gt;
          &lt;span class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;电压趋势&lt;/span&gt;
          &lt;el-tag type=&quot;info&quot;&gt;220V ± 5%&lt;/el-tag&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;chart-container&quot;&gt;
          &lt;canvas ref=&quot;voltageChart&quot;&gt;&lt;/canvas&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;chart-card&quot;&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;chart-header&quot;&gt;
          &lt;span class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;电流趋势&lt;/span&gt;
          &lt;el-tag type=&quot;warning&quot;&gt;峰值: {{ maxCurrent.toFixed(1) }}A&lt;/el-tag&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;chart-container&quot;&gt;
          &lt;canvas ref=&quot;currentChart&quot;&gt;&lt;/canvas&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;chart-section&quot;&gt;

        &lt;div class=&quot;chart-header&quot;&gt;
          &lt;span class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;功率与负载率&lt;/span&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;legend&quot;&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;legend-item&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;legend-dot power&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; 功率(kW)&lt;/span&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;legend-item&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;legend-dot load&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; 负载率(%)&lt;/span&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;chart-container&quot;&gt;
          &lt;canvas ref=&quot;powerChart&quot;&gt;&lt;/canvas&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;import { ref, computed, onMounted } from 'vue';
import { ArrowUp, ArrowDown } from '@element-plus/icons-vue';
import { loadHistoryData, energyStatistics } from '@/data/mockData';
const icons = { TrendingUp: ArrowUp, TrendingDown: ArrowDown };
const timeRange = ref('today');
const voltageChart = ref(null);
const currentChart = ref(null);
const powerChart = ref(null);
const statistics = computed(() =&gt; {
 return energyStatistics[timeRange.value];
});
const maxCurrent = computed(() =&gt; {
 return Math.max(...loadHistoryData.current);
});
const drawChart = (canvas, data, color, label, unit) =&gt; {
 const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
 const width = canvas.width;
 const height = canvas.height;
 const padding = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 30, left: 45 };
 const chartWidth = width - padding.left - padding.right;
 const chartHeight = height - padding.top - padding.bottom;
 const maxValue = Math.max(...data) * 1.1;
 const minValue = Math.min(...data) * 0.9;
 ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
 ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8';
 ctx.lineWidth = 1;
 for (let i = 0; i &lt;= 5; i++) {
 const y = padding.top + (chartHeight / 5) * i;
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.moveTo(padding.left, y);
 ctx.lineTo(width - padding.right, y);
 ctx.stroke();
 const value = maxValue - ((maxValue - minValue) / 5) * i;
 ctx.fillStyle = '#999';
 ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
 ctx.textAlign = 'right';
 ctx.fillText(value.toFixed(1), padding.left - 5, y + 4);
 }
 ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8';
 for (let i = 0; i &lt; loadHistoryData.labels.length; i++) {
 const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadHistoryData.labels.length - 1)) * i;
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.moveTo(x, padding.top);
 ctx.lineTo(x, height - padding.bottom);
 ctx.stroke();
 ctx.fillStyle = '#999';
 ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
 ctx.textAlign = 'center';
 ctx.fillText(loadHistoryData.labels[i], x, height - 8);
 }
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.strokeStyle = color;
 ctx.lineWidth = 2;
 ctx.shadowColor = color;
 ctx.shadowBlur = 5;
 data.forEach((value, index) =&gt; {
 const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (data.length - 1)) * index;
 const y = padding.top + chartHeight - ((value - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * chartHeight;
 if (index === 0) {
 ctx.moveTo(x, y);
 }
 else {
 ctx.lineTo(x, y);
 }
 });
 ctx.stroke();
 ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
 const lastX = padding.left + chartWidth;
 const lastY = padding.top + chartHeight - ((data[data.length - 1] - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * chartHeight;
 ctx.fillStyle = color;
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.arc(lastX, lastY, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
 ctx.fill();
 ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
 ctx.font = '12px sans-serif';
 ctx.textAlign = 'left';
 ctx.fillText(`${data[data.length - 1].toFixed(1)}${unit}`, lastX + 8, lastY + 4);
};
const drawPowerChart = (canvas) =&gt; {
 const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
 const width = canvas.width;
 const height = canvas.height;
 const padding = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 30, left: 55 };
 const chartWidth = width - padding.left - padding.right;
 const chartHeight = height - padding.top - padding.bottom;
 const powerData = loadHistoryData.power.map(p =&gt; p / 1000);
 const loadData = loadHistoryData.loadPercent;
 const maxPower = Math.max(...powerData) * 1.1;
 const maxLoad = 100;
 ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
 ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8';
 ctx.lineWidth = 1;
 for (let i = 0; i &lt;= 5; i++) {
 const y = padding.top + (chartHeight / 5) * i;
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.moveTo(padding.left, y);
 ctx.lineTo(width - padding.right, y);
 ctx.stroke();
 const powerValue = maxPower - (maxPower / 5) * i;
 ctx.fillStyle = '#999';
 ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
 ctx.textAlign = 'right';
 ctx.fillText(powerValue.toFixed(1), padding.left - 5, y + 4);
 }
 ctx.fillStyle = '#999';
 ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
 ctx.save();
 ctx.translate(20, height / 2);
 ctx.rotate(-Math.PI / 2);
 ctx.textAlign = 'center';
 ctx.fillText('功率(kW)', 0, 0);
 ctx.restore();
 ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8';
 for (let i = 0; i &lt; loadHistoryData.labels.length; i++) {
 const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadHistoryData.labels.length - 1)) * i;
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.moveTo(x, padding.top);
 ctx.lineTo(x, height - padding.bottom);
 ctx.stroke();
 ctx.fillStyle = '#999';
 ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
 ctx.textAlign = 'center';
 ctx.fillText(loadHistoryData.labels[i], x, height - 8);
 }
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.strokeStyle = '#1890ff';
 ctx.lineWidth = 2;
 ctx.shadowColor = '#1890ff';
 ctx.shadowBlur = 5;
 powerData.forEach((value, index) =&gt; {
 const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (powerData.length - 1)) * index;
 const y = padding.top + chartHeight - (value / maxPower) * chartHeight;
 if (index === 0) {
 ctx.moveTo(x, y);
 }
 else {
 ctx.lineTo(x, y);
 }
 });
 ctx.stroke();
 ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.strokeStyle = '#52c41a';
 ctx.lineWidth = 2;
 ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
 ctx.shadowColor = '#52c41a';
 ctx.shadowBlur = 3;
 loadData.forEach((value, index) =&gt; {
 const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadData.length - 1)) * index;
 const y = padding.top + chartHeight - (value / maxLoad) * chartHeight;
 if (index === 0) {
 ctx.moveTo(x, y);
 }
 else {
 ctx.lineTo(x, y);
 }
 });
 ctx.stroke();
 ctx.setLineDash([]);
 ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
};
const resizeCanvas = (canvas, width, height) =&gt; {
 const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
 canvas.width = width * dpr;
 canvas.height = height * dpr;
 canvas.style.width = width + 'px';
 canvas.style.height = height + 'px';
 canvas.getContext('2d').scale(dpr, dpr);
};
onMounted(() =&gt; {
 setTimeout(() =&gt; {
 if (voltageChart.value) {
 resizeCanvas(voltageChart.value, 450, 200);
 drawChart(voltageChart.value, loadHistoryData.voltage, '#1890ff', '电压', 'V');
 }
 if (currentChart.value) {
 resizeCanvas(currentChart.value, 450, 200);
 drawChart(currentChart.value, loadHistoryData.current, '#faad14', '电流', 'A');
 }
 if (powerChart.value) {
 resizeCanvas(powerChart.value, 920, 250);
 drawPowerChart(powerChart.value);
 }
 }, 100);
});
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'

const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(10)
const total = ref(0)
const showCircuitDialog = ref(false)
const currentModule = ref(null)
const circuitPage = ref(1)
const circuitPageSize = ref(10)
const circuitTotal = ref(0)

const filters = reactive({
  deviceName: '',
  status: ''
})

const modules = ref([
  { id: 1, no: 1, deviceName: '先导路集控1', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', moduleAddress: 66, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', serialNumber: '152403120001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' },
  { id: 2, no: 2, deviceName: '先导路集控1', moduleType: '12回路电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_12_4', moduleAddress: 4, model: 'EXC-G290C-C3', serialNumber: '112230620003', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' },
  { id: 3, no: 3, deviceName: '先导路集控1', moduleType: '8回路剩余电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_13_2', moduleAddress: 2, model: 'EXC-G290C-L4', serialNumber: '113230820001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' },
  { id: 4, no: 4, deviceName: '先导路集控2', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', moduleAddress: 3, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', serialNumber: '110231123001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:15' },
  { id: 5, no: 5, deviceName: '先导路集控2', moduleType: '4回路供电控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_14_6', moduleAddress: 6, model: 'EXC-G290C-P7', serialNumber: '114230210001', networkStatus: 'offline', updateTime: '2026-05-14 08:15:15' },
  { id: 6, no: 6, deviceName: '力唯中天集控1', moduleType: '12回路输入状态检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_11_5', moduleAddress: 5, model: 'EXC-G290C-D5', serialNumber: '111230620000', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' },
  { id: 7, no: 7, deviceName: '力唯中天集控1', moduleType: '8回路剩余电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_13_7', moduleAddress: 7, model: 'EXC-G290C-L4', serialNumber: '113230620006', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' },
  { id: 8, no: 8, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_10_1', moduleAddress: 1, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', serialNumber: '110231215560', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' },
  { id: 9, no: 9, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', moduleType: '12回路电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_12_2', moduleAddress: 2, model: 'EXC-G290C-C3', serialNumber: '112231215574', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' }
])

total.value = modules.value.length

const circuitData = ref([
  { id: 1, no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', circuitNo: 1, currentA: 3.2, currentB: 3.0, currentC: 3.1, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true },
  { id: 2, no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', circuitNo: 2, currentA: 2.8, currentB: 2.9, currentC: 2.7, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true },
  { id: 3, no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', circuitNo: 3, currentA: 0.0, currentB: 0.0, currentC: 0.0, circuitStatus: 'off', switchRecord: '2026-05-13 22:00:00 关', display: true },
  { id: 4, no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', circuitNo: 4, currentA: 4.5, currentB: 4.6, currentC: 4.4, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true },
  { id: 5, no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', circuitNo: 5, currentA: 1.2, currentB: 1.3, currentC: 1.1, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: false },
  { id: 6, no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', circuitNo: 6, currentA: 0.0, currentB: 0.0, currentC: 0.0, circuitStatus: 'off', switchRecord: '2026-05-13 22:00:00 关', display: true }
])

circuitTotal.value = circuitData.value.length

const filteredModules = computed(() =&gt; {
  let result = modules.value
  if (filters.deviceName) result = result.filter(m =&gt; m.deviceName.includes(filters.deviceName))
  if (filters.status) result = result.filter(m =&gt; m.networkStatus === filters.status)
  return result
})

const searchModules = () =&gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const resetFilters = () =&gt; {
  Object.assign(filters, { deviceName: '', status: '' })
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const refreshData = () =&gt; {
  ElMessage.success('数据已刷新')
}

const viewCircuitData = (row) =&gt; {
  currentModule.value = row
  showCircuitDialog.value = true
}

const refreshCircuitData = () =&gt; {
  ElMessage.success('回路数据已刷新')
}

const toggleDisplay = (row) =&gt; {
  ElMessage.success(`${row.circuitName} 显示状态已${row.display ? '开启' : '关闭'}`)
}

const viewCircuitDetail = (row) =&gt; {
  ElMessage.info(`查看 ${row.circuitName} 的详细数据`)
}
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;style scoped&gt;
.page-container {

  width: 200px;
}

.module-table {
  flex: 1;

  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  overflow: auto;
  min-width: 0;
}

:deep(.module-table .el-table) {
  min-width: 100%;
}

  margin-top: 15px;

}

  padding: 10px 0;

    &lt;div class=&quot;toolbar&quot;&gt;

      &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    
    &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt;
      &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filters.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景名称&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; clearable&gt;
        &lt;template #prefix&gt;
          &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt;
        &lt;/template&gt;
      &lt;/el-input&gt;
      &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filters.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择场景类型&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot; clearable&gt;
        &lt;el-option label=&quot;定时场景&quot; value=&quot;timer&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;el-option label=&quot;光感场景&quot; value=&quot;light&quot; /&gt;
      &lt;/el-select&gt;
      &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;searchScenes&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;el-button @click=&quot;resetFilters&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;

    &lt;el-table 
      :data=&quot;filteredScenes&quot;

    &gt;

        &lt;/template&gt;
      &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
    &lt;/el-table&gt;

    &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt;
      &lt;el-pagination
        v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot;
        v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot;
        :total=&quot;total&quot;
        :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&quot;
        layout=&quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&quot;
      /&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;

    &lt;!-- 新增/编辑场景弹窗 --&gt;
    &lt;el-dialog 
      :title=&quot;isEdit ? '编辑场景' : '新增场景'&quot; 
      v-model=&quot;showSceneDialog&quot; 
      width=&quot;700px&quot;
      :close-on-click-modal=&quot;false&quot;
    &gt;
      &lt;el-form :model=&quot;sceneForm&quot; :rules=&quot;sceneRules&quot; ref=&quot;sceneFormRef&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;场景名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;sceneForm.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景名称&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;场景类型&quot; prop=&quot;type&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;sceneForm.type&quot; @change=&quot;handleTypeChange&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-radio value=&quot;timer&quot;&gt;定时场景&lt;/el-radio&gt;
            &lt;el-radio value=&quot;light&quot;&gt;光感场景&lt;/el-radio&gt;
          &lt;/el-radio-group&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        
        &lt;!-- 定时场景配置 --&gt;
        &lt;template v-if=&quot;sceneForm.type === 'timer'&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-divider content-position=&quot;left&quot;&gt;定时动作配置&lt;/el-divider&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;timer-actions&quot;&gt;
            &lt;div v-for=&quot;(action, index) in sceneForm.actions&quot; :key=&quot;index&quot; class=&quot;action-item&quot;&gt;
              &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;10&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-col :span=&quot;5&quot;&gt;
                  &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;动作类型&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;el-option label=&quot;开灯&quot; value=&quot;on&quot; /&gt;
                    &lt;el-option label=&quot;关灯&quot; value=&quot;off&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;/el-select&gt;
                &lt;/el-col&gt;
                &lt;el-col :span=&quot;6&quot;&gt;
                  &lt;el-time-picker
                    v-model=&quot;action.time&quot;
                    placeholder=&quot;执行时间&quot;
                    format=&quot;HH:mm&quot;
                    value-format=&quot;HH:mm&quot;
                    style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;
                  /&gt;
                &lt;/el-col&gt;
                &lt;el-col :span=&quot;11&quot;&gt;
                  &lt;el-checkbox-group v-model=&quot;action.weekDays&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;1&quot;&gt;周一&lt;/el-checkbox&gt;
                    &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;2&quot;&gt;周二&lt;/el-checkbox&gt;
                    &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;3&quot;&gt;周三&lt;/el-checkbox&gt;
                    &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;4&quot;&gt;周四&lt;/el-checkbox&gt;
                    &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;5&quot;&gt;周五&lt;/el-checkbox&gt;
                    &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;6&quot;&gt;周六&lt;/el-checkbox&gt;
                    &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;0&quot;&gt;周日&lt;/el-checkbox&gt;
                  &lt;/el-checkbox-group&gt;
                &lt;/el-col&gt;
                &lt;el-col :span=&quot;2&quot;&gt;
                  &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; icon=&quot;Delete&quot; @click=&quot;removeAction(index)&quot; circle size=&quot;small&quot; /&gt;
                &lt;/el-col&gt;
              &lt;/el-row&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; plain @click=&quot;addAction&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt;+ 添加动作&lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/template&gt;
        
        &lt;!-- 光感场景配置 --&gt;
        &lt;template v-if=&quot;sceneForm.type === 'light'&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-divider content-position=&quot;left&quot;&gt;光感策略配置&lt;/el-divider&gt;
          &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;光感阈值&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-input-number v-model=&quot;sceneForm.lightThreshold&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;1000&quot; placeholder=&quot;光照阈值 (lux)&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;unit&quot;&gt;lux&lt;/span&gt;
          &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
          &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;触发动作&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;sceneForm.lightAction&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择触发动作&quot;&gt;
              &lt;el-option label=&quot;开灯&quot; value=&quot;on&quot; /&gt;
              &lt;el-option label=&quot;关灯&quot; value=&quot;off&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;/el-select&gt;
          &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
          &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;生效时段&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-time-picker
              v-model=&quot;sceneForm.lightTimeRange&quot;
              is-range
              placeholder=&quot;开始时间 - 结束时间&quot;
              format=&quot;HH:mm&quot;
              value-format=&quot;HH:mm&quot;
              range-separator=&quot;至&quot;
              start-placeholder=&quot;开始时间&quot;
              end-placeholder=&quot;结束时间&quot;
              style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;
            /&gt;
          &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;/template&gt;

        &lt;el-divider content-position=&quot;left&quot;&gt;关联设备&lt;/el-divider&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;选择设备&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-transfer
            v-model=&quot;sceneForm.devices&quot;
            :data=&quot;deviceOptions&quot;
            :titles=&quot;['可选设备', '已选设备']&quot;
            filterable
            filter-placeholder=&quot;搜索设备&quot;
          /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
      &lt;/el-form&gt;
      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showSceneDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitScene&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/template&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;

    &lt;!-- 详情弹窗 --&gt;
    &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;场景详情&quot; v-model=&quot;showDetailDialog&quot; width=&quot;600px&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;detail-content&quot; v-if=&quot;currentScene&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;1&quot; border&gt;
          &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;场景名称&quot;&gt;{{ currentScene.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
          &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;场景类型&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentScene.type === 'timer' ? 'primary' : 'success'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
              {{ currentScene.type === 'timer' ? '定时场景' : '光感场景' }}
            &lt;/el-tag&gt;
          &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
          &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;状态&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentScene.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'info'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
              {{ currentScene.status === 'active' ? '已启用' : '未启用' }}
            &lt;/el-tag&gt;
          &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
          &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;创建人&quot;&gt;{{ currentScene.creator }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
          &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;创建时间&quot;&gt;{{ currentScene.createTime }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt;
        &lt;/el-descriptions&gt;
        
        &lt;el-divider content-position=&quot;left&quot; style=&quot;margin-top: 20px&quot;&gt;策略配置&lt;/el-divider&gt;
        &lt;div v-if=&quot;currentScene.type === 'timer'&quot; class=&quot;timer-detail&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div v-for=&quot;(action, index) in currentScene.actions&quot; :key=&quot;index&quot; class=&quot;action-detail&quot;&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;action-no&quot;&gt;动作 {{ index + 1 }}：&lt;/span&gt;
            &lt;el-tag size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;{{ action.type === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}&lt;/el-tag&gt;
            &lt;span&gt;，执行时间：{{ action.time }}&lt;/span&gt;
            &lt;span&gt;，执行星期：{{ action.weekDaysText }}&lt;/span&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div v-else class=&quot;light-detail&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div&gt;光感阈值：{{ currentScene.lightThreshold }} lux&lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;div&gt;触发动作：{{ currentScene.lightAction === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}&lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;div&gt;生效时段：{{ currentScene.lightTimeRange[0] }} 至 {{ currentScene.lightTimeRange[1] }}&lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
import { Search, Plus, Delete, Clock, Sunrise, Download } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'

const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(10)
const total = ref(0)
const selectedRows = ref([])
const showSceneDialog = ref(false)
const showDetailDialog = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const currentScene = ref(null)
const sceneFormRef = ref(null)

const filters = reactive({
  name: '',
  type: ''
})

const weekDayMap = {
  '0': '周日',
  '1': '周一',
  '2': '周二',
  '3': '周三',
  '4': '周四',
  '5': '周五',
  '6': '周六'
}

const scenes = ref([
  {
    id: 1,
    no: 1,
    name: '夜间照明场景',
    type: 'timer',
    status: 'active',
    deployCount: 15,
    creator: '管理员',
    createTime: '2026-05-10 10:00:00',
    actions: [
      { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'] },
      { type: 'off', time: '06:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'] }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    no: 2,
    name: '周末照明场景',
    type: 'timer',
    status: 'active',
    deployCount: 8,
    creator: '管理员',
    createTime: '2026-05-12 14:30:00',
    actions: [
      { type: 'on', time: '19:00', weekDays: ['6', '0'] },
      { type: 'off', time: '07:00', weekDays: ['6', '0'] }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    no: 3,
    name: '阴天自动照明',
    type: 'light',
    status: 'inactive',
    deployCount: 5,
    creator: '管理员',
    createTime: '2026-05-13 09:00:00',
    lightThreshold: 200,
    lightAction: 'on',
    lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '20:00']
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    no: 4,
    name: '强光自动关闭',
    type: 'light',
    status: 'active',
    deployCount: 3,
    creator: '管理员',
    createTime: '2026-05-14 16:00:00',
    lightThreshold: 800,
    lightAction: 'off',
    lightTimeRange: ['08:00', '18:00']
  }
])

total.value = scenes.value.length

const deviceOptions = ref([
  { key: 1, label: '先导路集控1' },
  { key: 2, label: '先导路集控2' },
  { key: 3, label: '力唯中天集控1' },
  { key: 4, label: '力唯中天集控2' }
])

const sceneForm = reactive({
  name: '',
  type: 'timer',
  actions: [
    { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }
  ],
  lightThreshold: 200,
  lightAction: 'on',
  lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '22:00'],
  devices: []
})

const sceneRules = {
  name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入场景名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择场景类型', trigger: 'change' }]
}

const filteredScenes = computed(() =&gt; {
  let result = scenes.value
  if (filters.name) {
    result = result.filter(s =&gt; s.name.includes(filters.name))
  }
  if (filters.type) {
    result = result.filter(s =&gt; s.type === filters.type)
  }
  return result
})

const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; {
  selectedRows.value = selection
}

const searchScenes = () =&gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const resetFilters = () =&gt; {
  Object.assign(filters, { name: '', type: '' })
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const handleAdd = () =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  resetSceneForm()
  showSceneDialog.value = true
}

const handleLightSensor = () =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  resetSceneForm()
  sceneForm.type = 'light'
  showSceneDialog.value = true
}

const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  Object.assign(sceneForm, {
    name: row.name,
    type: row.type,
    actions: row.type === 'timer' ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(row.actions)) : [],
    lightThreshold: row.lightThreshold || 200,
    lightAction: row.lightAction || 'on',
    lightTimeRange: row.lightTimeRange || ['06:00', '22:00'],
    devices: []
  })
  showSceneDialog.value = true
}

const handleView = (row) =&gt; {
  currentScene.value = {
    ...row,
    actions: row.actions ? row.actions.map(a =&gt; ({
      ...a,
      weekDaysText: a.weekDays.map(d =&gt; weekDayMap[d]).join('、')
    })) : []
  }
  showDetailDialog.value = true
}

const handleDeploy = () =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要下发选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个场景吗？`,
    '场景下发',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    ElMessage.success('场景下发成功')
  })
}

const handleDelete = () =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个场景吗？`,
    '删除确认',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  })
}

const handleDeleteOne = (row) =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要删除场景【${row.name}】吗？`,
    '删除确认',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  })
}

const submitScene = () =&gt; {
  sceneFormRef.value.validate((valid) =&gt; {
    if (valid) {
      if (sceneForm.type === 'timer' &amp;&amp; sceneForm.actions.length === 0) {
        ElMessage.warning('请至少添加一个定时动作')
        return
      }
      ElMessage.success(isEdit.value ? '编辑成功' : '创建成功')
      showSceneDialog.value = false
    }
  })
}

const addAction = () =&gt; {
  sceneForm.actions.push({
    type: 'on',
    time: '18:00',
    weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0']
  })
}

const removeAction = (index) =&gt; {
  if (sceneForm.actions.length &gt; 1) {
    sceneForm.actions.splice(index, 1)
  } else {
    ElMessage.warning('至少保留一个动作')
  }
}

const handleTypeChange = () =&gt; {
  if (sceneForm.type === 'timer') {
    sceneForm.actions = [{ type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }]
  }
}

const resetSceneForm = () =&gt; {
  Object.assign(sceneForm, {
    name: '',
    type: 'timer',
    actions: [
      { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }
    ],
    lightThreshold: 200,
    lightAction: 'on',
    lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '22:00'],
    devices: []
  })
}
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;style scoped&gt;
.page-container {
  padding: 20px;
  background: #f0f2f5;
  min-height: 100%;
}

.toolbar {
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.filter-bar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 15px;
  padding: 15px;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  margin-bottom: 20px;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref } from 'vue';
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue';

const activeTab = ref('condition');
const showTimeRangeDialog = ref(false);

const formData = ref({
  name: '',
  priority: 'high',
  executeType: 'always',
  conditions: [
    {
      productType: '',
      device: '',
      triggerType: '',
      triggerCondition: ''
    }
  ],
  actions: [
    {
      productType: '',
      device: '',
      action: ''
    }
  ]
});

const timeRangeData = ref({
  startTime: '',
  endTime: ''
});

const addCondition = () =&gt; {
  formData.value.conditions.push({
    productType: '',
    device: '',
    triggerType: '',
    triggerCondition: ''
  });
};

const removeCondition = (index) =&gt; {
  if (formData.value.conditions.length &gt; 1) {
    formData.value.conditions.splice(index, 1);
  }
};

const addAction = () =&gt; {
  formData.value.actions.push({
    productType: '',
    device: '',
    action: ''
  });
};

const removeAction = (index) =&gt; {
  if (formData.value.actions.length &gt; 1) {
    formData.value.actions.splice(index, 1);
  }
};

const handleSave = () =&gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name) {
    alert('请输入规则名称');
    return;
  }
  alert('规则保存成功');
};

const handleCancel = () =&gt; {
  formData.value = {
    name: '',
    priority: 'high',
    executeType: 'always',
    conditions: [
      {
        productType: '',
        device: '',
        triggerType: '',
        triggerCondition: ''
      }
    ],
    actions: [
      {
        productType: '',
        device: '',
        action: ''
      }
    ]
  };
};

const handleTimeRange = () =&gt; {
  showTimeRangeDialog.value = true;
};

const confirmTimeRange = () =&gt; {
  showTimeRangeDialog.value = false;
  alert('触发时间段设置成功');
};
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';

const activeTab = ref('control');
const filterKeyword = ref('');
const showAddDialog = ref(false);
const showResultDialog = ref(false);

const formData = ref({
  name: '',
  visible: true,
  sortOrder: 1
});

const resultData = ref({});

const scenesData = ref([
  { id: 1, name: '(0)应急开灯', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 2, name: '(0)某路段人工复查', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 3, name: '(1)线性灯-100', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 4, name: '(1)线性灯-10', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 5, name: '(1)线性灯-50', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 6, name: '(1)线性灯关', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 7, name: '(1)隧道灯具全关', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 8, name: '(2)高速灯-100', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 9, name: '(2)高速灯-50', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 10, name: '(2)高速灯-10', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 11, name: '(2)高速灯关', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 12, name: '(3)低位红光关闭', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 13, name: '(3)低位雾光关闭', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 14, name: '(3)低位雾光开', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 15, name: '(3)低位白光关闭', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 16, name: '(3)低位白光开', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 17, name: '(3)低位红光开', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 18, name: '(5)灯具展示100...', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 19, name: '(99)展厅一键全开', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 20, name: '(99)展厅全关', visible: true, selected: false }
]);

const recordsData = ref([
  { no: 1, sceneName: '应急开灯', executeTime: '2024-04-22 10:26:58', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制156盏灯具' },
  { no: 2, sceneName: '隧道灯具全关', executeTime: '2024-04-22 09:15:30', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制89盏灯具' },
  { no: 3, sceneName: '线性灯-50', executeTime: '2024-04-22 08:00:00', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制234盏灯具' },
  { no: 4, sceneName: '高速灯-100', executeTime: '2024-04-21 22:30:00', status: 'danger', detail: '执行失败，部分设备离线' }
]);

const filteredScenes = computed(() =&gt; {
  if (!filterKeyword.value) return scenesData.value;
  const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase();
  return scenesData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
});

const handleSearch = () =&gt; {};

const handleReset = () =&gt; {
  filterKeyword.value = '';
};

const handleAdd = () =&gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true;
  formData.value = { name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: scenesData.value.length + 1 };
};

const handleConfirmAdd = () =&gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name) {
    alert('请输入场景名称');
    return;
  }
  scenesData.value.push({
    id: scenesData.value.length + 1,
    name: formData.value.name,
    visible: formData.value.visible,
    selected: false
  });
  showAddDialog.value = false;
};

const handleExecute = (scene) =&gt; {
  alert(`正在执行场景：${scene.name}`);
};

const handleResult = (scene) =&gt; {
  showResultDialog.value = true;
  resultData.value = {
    name: scene.name,
    executeTime: new Date().toLocaleString(),
    status: 'success',
    detail: '执行成功，共控制156盏灯具'
  };
};

const handleMore = (scene) =&gt; {
  alert(`更多操作：${scene.name}`);
};
&lt;/script&gt;

          &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;

        &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filterKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入规则名称查询&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterStatus&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择启用状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;启用&quot; value=&quot;true&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;禁用&quot; value=&quot;false&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;/el-select&gt;
          &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterPriority&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择优先级&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;高&quot; value=&quot;high&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;低&quot; value=&quot;low&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;/el-select&gt;
          &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;搜索&lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;

        &lt;div v-if=&quot;viewMode === 'card'&quot; class=&quot;rule-cards&quot;&gt;

            v-for=&quot;rule in filteredRules&quot;
            :key=&quot;rule.id&quot;
            class=&quot;rule-card&quot;

              &lt;/div&gt;
