            &lt;/div&gt;
            &lt;div class=&quot;card-body&quot;&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;execute-info&quot;&gt;
                &lt;span&gt;执行日期:&lt;/span&gt;
                &lt;span&gt;{{ rule.executeDate }}&lt;/span&gt;
              &lt;/div&gt;
              &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;handleMore(rule)&quot;&gt;...&lt;/el-button&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;/el-card&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;

        &lt;div v-else class=&quot;list-panel&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredRules&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
            &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
            &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;规则名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
            &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;priority&quot; label=&quot;优先级&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;
              &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.priority === 'high' ? 'danger' : 'info'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
                  {{ row.priority === 'high' ? '高' : '低' }}
                &lt;/el-tag&gt;
              &lt;/template&gt;
            &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
            &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;enabled&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;
              &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-switch v-model=&quot;row.enabled&quot; active-text=&quot;启用&quot; inactive-text=&quot;禁用&quot; /&gt;
              &lt;/template&gt;
            &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
            &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;executeDate&quot; label=&quot;执行日期&quot; min-width=&quot;180&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
            &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;
              &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt;
                &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt;
              &lt;/template&gt;
            &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
          &lt;/el-table&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;

        &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-bar&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-pagination
            v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot;
            v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot;
            :total=&quot;total&quot;
            layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, total&quot;
          /&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;

    &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;新增规则&quot; v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt;
      &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;规则名称&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入规则名称&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;优先级&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.priority&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;高&quot; value=&quot;high&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;低&quot; value=&quot;low&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;/el-select&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行日期&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.executeType&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;一直执行&quot; value=&quot;always&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;定时执行&quot; value=&quot;scheduled&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;/el-select&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item v-if=&quot;formData.executeType === 'scheduled'&quot; label=&quot;执行时间&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;formData.executeTime&quot; type=&quot;datetime&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择执行时间&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
      &lt;/el-form&gt;
      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleConfirmAdd&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/template&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';

const viewMode = ref('card');
const filterKeyword = ref('');
const filterStatus = ref('');
const filterPriority = ref('');
const currentPage = ref(1);
const pageSize = ref(10);
const selectedRows = ref([]);
const showAddDialog = ref(false);

const formData = ref({
  name: '',
  priority: 'high',
  executeType: 'always',
  executeTime: ''
});

const rulesData = ref([
  { id: 1, no: 1, name: '检测有人开', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '2025.09.01-2028.10.31', selected: false },
  { id: 2, no: 2, name: '漏电自动断电', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false },
  { id: 3, no: 3, name: '光照度亮灯', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false },
  { id: 4, no: 4, name: '关回路', priority: 'low', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false },
  { id: 5, no: 5, name: '检测无人关', priority: 'low', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false }
]);

const total = computed(() =&gt; rulesData.value.length);

const filteredRules = computed(() =&gt; {
  let data = [...rulesData.value];
  if (filterKeyword.value) {
    const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase();
    data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
  }
  if (filterStatus.value !== '') {
    const status = filterStatus.value === 'true';
    data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.enabled === status);
  }
  if (filterPriority.value) {
    data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.priority === filterPriority.value);
  }
  return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value);
});

const handleSearch = () =&gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1;
};

const handleReset = () =&gt; {
  filterKeyword.value = '';
  filterStatus.value = '';
  filterPriority.value = '';
  currentPage.value = 1;
};

const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&gt; {
  selectedRows.value = val;
};

const handleAdd = () =&gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true;
  formData.value = {
    name: '',
    priority: 'high',
    executeType: 'always',
    executeTime: ''
  };
};

const handleConfirmAdd = () =&gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name) {
    alert('请输入规则名称');
    return;
  }
  rulesData.value.push({
    id: rulesData.value.length + 1,
    no: rulesData.value.length + 1,
    name: formData.value.name,
    priority: formData.value.priority,
    enabled: true,
    executeDate: formData.value.executeType === 'always' ? '一直执行' : formData.value.executeTime,
    selected: false
  });
  showAddDialog.value = false;
};

const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; {
  alert(`编辑规则：${row.name}`);
};

const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; {
  const index = rulesData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.id === row.id);
  if (index !== -1) {
    rulesData.value.splice(index, 1);
  }
};

const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; {
  selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; {
    const index = rulesData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.id === row.id);
    if (index !== -1) {
      rulesData.value.splice(index, 1);
    }
  });
  selectedRows.value = [];
};

const handleToggle = (rule) =&gt; {
  alert(`${rule.name}已${rule.enabled ? '启用' : '禁用'}`);
};

const handleMore = (rule) =&gt; {
  alert(`更多操作：${rule.name}`);
};
&lt;/script&gt;

  <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneManage.vue</div>
  <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSave&quot;&gt;保存&lt;/el-button&gt;
            &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleCancel&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;

        &lt;div class=&quot;form-section&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;form-row&quot;&gt;
            &lt;div class=&quot;form-item&quot;&gt;
              &lt;label class=&quot;required&quot;&gt;场景名称&lt;/label&gt;
              &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景名称&quot; class=&quot;form-input&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
            &lt;div class=&quot;form-item&quot;&gt;
              &lt;label class=&quot;required&quot;&gt;显示状态&lt;/label&gt;
              &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.visible&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-option label=&quot;显示&quot; :value=&quot;true&quot; /&gt;
                &lt;el-option label=&quot;隐藏&quot; :value=&quot;false&quot; /&gt;
              &lt;/el-select&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
            &lt;div class=&quot;form-item&quot;&gt;
              &lt;label class=&quot;required&quot;&gt;排序序号&lt;/label&gt;
              &lt;el-input type=&quot;number&quot; v-model=&quot;formData.sortOrder&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入排序序号&quot; class=&quot;form-input&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;

        &lt;div class=&quot;action-section&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;section-header&quot;&gt;
            &lt;span&gt;动作配置&lt;/span&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;addAction&quot;&gt;
              &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Plus /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt;
            &lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;

          &lt;div class=&quot;action-list&quot;&gt;
            &lt;div v-for=&quot;(action, index) in formData.actions&quot; :key=&quot;index&quot; class=&quot;action-item&quot;&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;action-index&quot;&gt;{{ index + 1 }}&lt;/div&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;action-fields&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.productType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择产品类型&quot; class=&quot;action-select&quot;&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯控制器&quot; value=&quot;灯控制器&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;集控&quot; value=&quot;集控&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;传感器&quot; value=&quot;传感器&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;摄像头&quot; value=&quot;摄像头&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;智能主控&quot; value=&quot;智能主控&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;智能主控-站点&quot; value=&quot;智能主控-站点&quot; /&gt;
                &lt;/el-select&gt;
                &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.device&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择设备&quot; class=&quot;action-select&quot;&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; value=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; value=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; /&gt;
                &lt;/el-select&gt;
                &lt;div class=&quot;delay-group&quot;&gt;
                  &lt;el-input type=&quot;number&quot; v-model=&quot;action.delay&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入延时时长&quot; class=&quot;delay-input&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.delayUnit&quot; class=&quot;delay-unit&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;el-option label=&quot;秒&quot; value=&quot;秒&quot; /&gt;
                    &lt;el-option label=&quot;分&quot; value=&quot;分&quot; /&gt;
                    &lt;el-option label=&quot;时&quot; value=&quot;时&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;/el-select&gt;
                &lt;/div&gt;
                &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.action&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择动作内容&quot; class=&quot;action-select&quot;&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;开灯&quot; value=&quot;开灯&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;关灯&quot; value=&quot;关灯&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;调光50%&quot; value=&quot;调光50%&quot; /&gt;
                  &lt;el-option label=&quot;调光100%&quot; value=&quot;调光100%&quot; /&gt;
                &lt;/el-select&gt;
              &lt;/div&gt;
              &lt;div class=&quot;action-controls&quot;&gt;
                &lt;el-button v-if=&quot;index &gt; 0&quot; type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;moveUp(index)&quot;&gt;↑&lt;/el-button&gt;
                &lt;el-button v-if=&quot;index &lt; formData.actions.length - 1&quot; type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;moveDown(index)&quot;&gt;↓&lt;/el-button&gt;
                &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;removeAction(index)&quot;&gt;×&lt;/el-button&gt;
              &lt;/div&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref } from 'vue';
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue';

const formData = ref({
  name: '',
  visible: true,
  sortOrder: 1,
  actions: [
    {
      productType: '',
      device: '',
      delay: '',
      delayUnit: '秒',
      action: ''
    }
  ]
});

const addAction = () =&gt; {
  formData.value.actions.push({
    productType: '',
    device: '',
    delay: '',
    delayUnit: '秒',
    action: ''
  });
};

const removeAction = (index) =&gt; {
  if (formData.value.actions.length &gt; 1) {
    formData.value.actions.splice(index, 1);
  }
};

const moveUp = (index) =&gt; {
  if (index &gt; 0) {
    const temp = formData.value.actions[index];
    formData.value.actions[index] = formData.value.actions[index - 1];
    formData.value.actions[index - 1] = temp;
  }
};

const moveDown = (index) =&gt; {
  if (index &lt; formData.value.actions.length - 1) {
    const temp = formData.value.actions[index];
    formData.value.actions[index] = formData.value.actions[index + 1];
    formData.value.actions[index + 1] = temp;
  }
};

const handleSave = () =&gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name) {
    alert('请输入场景名称');
    return;
  }
  alert('场景保存成功');
};

const handleCancel = () =&gt; {
  formData.value = {
    name: '',
    visible: true,
    sortOrder: 1,
    actions: [
      {
        productType: '',
        device: '',
        delay: '',
        delayUnit: '秒',
        action: ''
      }
    ]
  };
};
&lt;/script&gt;

  <h2 id="file-42">src/views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue</h2>
  <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue</div>
  <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;定时场景管理&lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;addSchedule&quot;&gt;
          &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Plus&quot; /&gt;
          新增定时
        &lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;el-table :data=&quot;schedules&quot; border class=&quot;schedule-table&quot;&gt;
      &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;id&quot; label=&quot;定时编号&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt;
      &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;定时名称&quot; /&gt;
      &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;templateName&quot; label=&quot;关联场景&quot; width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt;
      &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;scheduleType&quot; label=&quot;执行类型&quot; width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;
        &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getTypeTagType(scope.row.scheduleType)&quot;&gt;
            {{ getTypeText(scope.row.scheduleType) }}
          &lt;/el-tag&gt;
        &lt;/template&gt;
      &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
      &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;time&quot; label=&quot;执行时间&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt;
      &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;enabled&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;
        &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-switch 
            :value=&quot;scope.row.enabled&quot; 
            @change=&quot;toggleEnable(scope.row)&quot;
            active-color=&quot;#13ce66&quot;
            inactive-color=&quot;#ff4949&quot;
          /&gt;
        &lt;/template&gt;
      &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
      &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;180&quot;&gt;
        &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;editSchedule(scope.row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; type=&quot;danger&quot; @click=&quot;deleteSchedule(scope.row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;/template&gt;
      &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
    &lt;/el-table&gt;
    &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;editDialogTitle&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;dialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt;
      &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;定时名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入定时名称&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;关联场景&quot; prop=&quot;templateId&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.templateId&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择场景&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-option 
              v-for=&quot;template in enabledTemplates&quot; 
              :key=&quot;template.id&quot; 
              :label=&quot;template.name&quot; 
              :value=&quot;template.id&quot; 
            /&gt;
          &lt;/el-select&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行类型&quot; prop=&quot;scheduleType&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.scheduleType&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;每天&quot; value=&quot;daily&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;周末&quot; value=&quot;weekend&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;节假日&quot; value=&quot;holiday&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;/el-select&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行时间&quot; prop=&quot;time&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-time-picker 
            v-model=&quot;formData.time&quot; 
            format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; 
            placeholder=&quot;选择执行时间&quot;
          /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
      &lt;/el-form&gt;
      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;dialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;saveSchedule&quot;&gt;保存&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/template&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { scheduledScenes, sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Plus }
const schedules = ref([...scheduledScenes])
const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates])
const dialogVisible = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const formData = ref({
  id: '',
  name: '',
  templateId: '',
  scheduleType: 'daily',
  time: '',
  enabled: true
})

const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑定时场景' : '新增定时场景')

const enabledTemplates = computed(() =&gt; {
  return templates.value.filter(t =&gt; t.enabled)
})

const schedulesWithTemplateName = computed(() =&gt; {
  return schedules.value.map(s =&gt; {
    const template = templates.value.find(t =&gt; t.id === s.templateId)
    return {
      ...s,
      templateName: template ? template.name : '未知场景'
    }
  })
})

const getTypeTagType = (type) =&gt; {
  switch (type) {
    case 'daily': return 'success'
    case 'weekend': return 'warning'
    case 'holiday': return 'info'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getTypeText = (type) =&gt; {
  switch (type) {
    case 'daily': return '每天'
    case 'weekend': return '周末'
    case 'holiday': return '节假日'
    default: return type
  }
}

const addSchedule = () =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  formData.value = {
    id: '',
    name: '',
    templateId: '',
    scheduleType: 'daily',
    time: '',
    enabled: true
  }
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const editSchedule = (row) =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  formData.value = { ...row }
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const deleteSchedule = (row) =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    '确定要删除该定时任务吗？',
    '提示',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    const index = schedules.value.findIndex(s =&gt; s.id === row.id)
    if (index &gt; -1) {
      schedules.value.splice(index, 1)
    }
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  }).catch(() =&gt; {
    ElMessage.info('已取消删除')
  })
}

const toggleEnable = (row) =&gt; {
  row.enabled = !row.enabled
}

const saveSchedule = () =&gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.templateId || !formData.value.time) {
    ElMessage.warning('请填写完整信息')
    return
  }
  
  if (isEdit.value) {
    const index = schedules.value.findIndex(s =&gt; s.id === formData.value.id)
    if (index &gt; -1) {
      schedules.value[index] = { ...formData.value }
    }
    ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  } else {
    const newId = 'SCH' + String(schedules.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0')
    schedules.value.push({
      ...formData.value,
      id: newId
    })
    ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  }
  dialogVisible.value = false
}
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;style scoped&gt;
.schedule-table {
  width: 100%;
}
&lt;/style&gt;
</div>
  <hr class="section-divider">

  <h2 id="file-43">src/views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue</h2>
  <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue</div>
  <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;场景模板配置&lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;addTemplate&quot;&gt;
          &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Plus&quot; /&gt;
          新增模板
        &lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;template-grid&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div 
        v-for=&quot;template in templates&quot; 
        :key=&quot;template.id&quot;
        :class=&quot;['template-card', { disabled: !template.enabled }]&quot;
      &gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;template-header&quot;&gt;
          &lt;span class=&quot;template-name&quot;&gt;{{ template.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
          &lt;el-switch 
            :value=&quot;template.enabled&quot; 
            @change=&quot;toggleEnable(template)&quot;
            active-color=&quot;#13ce66&quot;
            inactive-color=&quot;#ff4949&quot;
          /&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;p class=&quot;template-desc&quot;&gt;{{ template.description }}&lt;/p&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;template-config&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;config-item&quot;&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;config-label&quot;&gt;亮度&lt;/span&gt;
            &lt;el-progress :percentage=&quot;template.brightness&quot; :show-text=&quot;true&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;div v-if=&quot;template.duration&quot; class=&quot;config-item&quot;&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;config-label&quot;&gt;时段&lt;/span&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;config-value&quot;&gt;{{ template.duration }}&lt;/span&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;template-actions&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;editTemplate(template)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; type=&quot;danger&quot; @click=&quot;deleteTemplate(template)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;editDialogTitle&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;dialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt;
      &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;场景名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景名称&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;场景描述&quot; prop=&quot;description&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-textarea v-model=&quot;formData.description&quot; rows=&quot;3&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景描述&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;亮度(%)&quot; prop=&quot;brightness&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;formData.brightness&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; :step=&quot;1&quot; show-input /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;定时时段&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.duration&quot; placeholder=&quot;如: 02:00-05:00，为空则全天生效&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
      &lt;/el-form&gt;
      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;dialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;saveTemplate&quot;&gt;保存&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/template&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Plus }
const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates])
const dialogVisible = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const formData = ref({
  id: '',
  name: '',
  description: '',
  brightness: 80,
  duration: '',
  enabled: true
})

const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑场景模板' : '新增场景模板')

const addTemplate = () =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  formData.value = {
    id: '',
    name: '',
    description: '',
    brightness: 80,
    duration: '',
    enabled: true
  }
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const editTemplate = (template) =&gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  formData.value = { ...template }
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const deleteTemplate = (template) =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    '确定要删除该场景模板吗？',
    '提示',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    const index = templates.value.findIndex(t =&gt; t.id === template.id)
    if (index &gt; -1) {
      templates.value.splice(index, 1)
    }
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  }).catch(() =&gt; {
    ElMessage.info('已取消删除')
  })
}

const toggleEnable = (template) =&gt; {
  template.enabled = !template.enabled
}

const saveTemplate = () =&gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name) {
    ElMessage.warning('请填写场景名称')
    return
  }
  
  if (isEdit.value) {
    const index = templates.value.findIndex(t =&gt; t.id === formData.value.id)
    if (index &gt; -1) {
      templates.value[index] = { ...formData.value }
    }
    ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  } else {
    const newId = 'S' + String(templates.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0')
    templates.value.push({
      ...formData.value,
      id: newId
    })
    ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  }
  dialogVisible.value = false
}
&lt;/script&gt;

  <h2 id="file-44">src/views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue</h2>
  <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue</div>
  <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;一键场景触发&lt;/div&gt;

        &lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;

        &gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;trigger-icon&quot;&gt;
            &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Lightbulb&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;trigger-info&quot;&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;trigger-name&quot;&gt;{{ template.name }}&lt;/span&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;trigger-brightness&quot;&gt;亮度: {{ template.brightness }}%&lt;/span&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;触发&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;trigger-section&quot;&gt;

            {{ currentScene ? '场景运行中: ' + currentScene.name : '无场景运行' }}
          &lt;/el-tag&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div v-if=&quot;currentScene&quot; class=&quot;scene-detail&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;detail-row&quot;&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;detail-label&quot;&gt;亮度设置&lt;/span&gt;
            &lt;el-progress :percentage=&quot;currentScene.brightness&quot; :show-text=&quot;true&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;detail-row&quot;&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;detail-label&quot;&gt;启动时间&lt;/span&gt;
            &lt;span class=&quot;detail-value&quot;&gt;{{ currentScene.startTime }}&lt;/span&gt;

      &lt;/div&gt;

        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;time&quot; label=&quot;触发时间&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;sceneName&quot; label=&quot;场景名称&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;brightness&quot; label=&quot;亮度(%)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;operator&quot; label=&quot;操作人&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;
          &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;scope.row.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot;&gt;
              {{ scope.row.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }}
            &lt;/el-tag&gt;
          &lt;/template&gt;
        &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
      &lt;/el-table&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;场景触发确认&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;confirmDialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;400px&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;confirm-content&quot;&gt;
        &lt;p&gt;确认触发场景:&lt;/p&gt;
        &lt;p class=&quot;scene-name&quot;&gt;{{ pendingScene?.name }}&lt;/p&gt;
        &lt;p class=&quot;scene-desc&quot;&gt;{{ pendingScene?.description }}&lt;/p&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;confirmDialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;confirmTrigger&quot;&gt;确认触发&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/template&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Refresh, Sunrise } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Refresh, Lightbulb: Sunrise }
const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates])
const confirmDialogVisible = ref(false)
const pendingScene = ref(null)
const currentScene = ref(null)

const triggerHistory = ref([
  { id: 1, time: '2024-01-15 14:30:22', sceneName: '节能模式', brightness: 50, operator: '管理员', status: 'success' },
  { id: 2, time: '2024-01-15 10:15:33', sceneName: '节日庆典模式', brightness: 100, operator: '张三', status: 'success' },
  { id: 3, time: '2024-01-14 22:00:00', sceneName: '深夜模式', brightness: 30, operator: '系统自动', status: 'success' },
  { id: 4, time: '2024-01-14 18:30:00', sceneName: '日常照明策略', brightness: 100, operator: '系统自动', status: 'success' },
  { id: 5, time: '2024-01-13 14:20:00', sceneName: '雾霾模式', brightness: 90, operator: '李四', status: 'success' }
])

const enabledTemplates = computed(() =&gt; {
  return templates.value.filter(t =&gt; t.enabled)
})

const triggerScene = (template) =&gt; {
  pendingScene.value = template
  confirmDialogVisible.value = true
}

const confirmTrigger = () =&gt; {
  if (pendingScene.value) {
    currentScene.value = {
      ...pendingScene.value,
      startTime: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN')
    }
    triggerHistory.value.unshift({
      id: Date.now(),
      time: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN'),
      sceneName: pendingScene.value.name,
      brightness: pendingScene.value.brightness,
      operator: '管理员',
      status: 'success'
    })
    ElMessage.success('场景触发成功')
  }
  confirmDialogVisible.value = false
}

const stopScene = () =&gt; {
  currentScene.value = null
  ElMessage.info('场景已停止')
}

const refreshStatus = () =&gt; {
  ElMessage.success('状态已刷新')
}
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'

const showAddDialog = ref(false)
const filterDeviceType = ref('')
const filterStatus = ref('')
const selectedRows = ref([])
const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(15)

const mockData = ref([
  {
    no: 1,
    levelName: '力唯中天产业园',
    deviceType: '集控',
    alarmType: '设备掉电告警,设备离线告警',

    status: '启用'
  },
  {
    no: 2,

])

const total = computed(() =&gt; mockData.value.length)

const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; {
  let result = mockData.value
  if (filterDeviceType.value) {
    result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.deviceType === filterDeviceType.value)
  }
  if (filterStatus.value) {
    result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.status === filterStatus.value)
  }
  return result
})

const formData = ref({
  levelName: '',
  deviceType: '',
  alarmType: [],
  workOrderType: ''
})

const handleAdd = () =&gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true
  formData.value = {
    levelName: '',
    deviceType: '',
    alarmType: [],
    workOrderType: ''
  }
}

const handleSearch = () =&gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const handleReset = () =&gt; {
  filterDeviceType.value = ''
  filterStatus.value = ''
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&gt; {
  selectedRows.value = val
}

const handleToggleStatus = (row) =&gt; {
  row.status = row.status === '启用' ? '关闭' : '启用'
}

const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true
  formData.value = {
    levelName: row.levelName,
    deviceType: row.deviceType,
    alarmType: row.alarmType.split(','),
    workOrderType: row.workOrderType
  }
}

const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; {
  const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no)
  if (index !== -1) {
    mockData.value.splice(index, 1)
  }
}

const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; {
  selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; {
    const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no)
    if (index !== -1) {
      mockData.value.splice(index, 1)
    }
  })
  selectedRows.value = []
}

const handleConfirm = () =&gt; {
  if (!formData.value.levelName || !formData.value.deviceType || !formData.value.alarmType.length || !formData.value.workOrderType) {
    alert('请填写所有必填字段')
    return
  }
  const newRecord = {
    no: mockData.value.length + 1,
    levelName: formData.value.levelName,
    deviceType: formData.value.deviceType,
    alarmType: formData.value.alarmType.join(','),
    workOrderType: formData.value.workOrderType,
    status: '启用'
  }
  mockData.value.push(newRecord)
  showAddDialog.value = false
}

const handleSizeChange = (val) =&gt; {
  pageSize.value = val
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&gt; {
  currentPage.value = val
}
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;style scoped&gt;
.page-container {
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 15px;
}

.page-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  padding-bottom: 15px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
}

.header-right {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
}

.filter-bar {

  gap: 15px;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.filter-select {
  width: 180px;
}

  min-height: 0;
}

.form-select {
  width: 100%;
}

  display: flex;

  gap: 15px;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'

const router = useRouter()
const formData = ref({
  type: '',
  title: '',
  description: '',
  location: '',
  priority: 'medium',
  status: 'pending',
  assignee: '',
  createTime: '',
  updateTime: ''
})

const generateId = () =&gt; {
  const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase()
  return 'WO' + timestamp.slice(-3) + String(Math.random()).slice(-3).toUpperCase()
}

const submitForm = () =&gt; {
  if (!formData.value.type || !formData.value.title || !formData.value.location) {
    ElMessage.warning('请填写必填项')
    return
  }
  
  const now = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN')
  formData.value.id = generateId()
  formData.value.createTime = now
  formData.value.updateTime = now
  
  ElMessage.success('工单创建成功')
  router.push('/workorder/list')
}
&lt;/script&gt;

                {{ order.type === 'fault' ? '故障工单' : '维修工单' }}
              &lt;/el-tag&gt;
            &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
            &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;优先级&quot;&gt;
              &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getPriorityTagType(order.priority)&quot;&gt;
                {{ getPriorityText(order.priority) }}

                {{ getStatusText(order.status) }}
              &lt;/el-tag&gt;
            &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
            &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;处理人员&quot;&gt;{{ order.assignee || '未分配' }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt;
          &lt;/el-form&gt;

            &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;更新时间&quot;&gt;{{ order.updateTime }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt;
          &lt;/el-form&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;status-timeline&quot;&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;timeline-title&quot;&gt;工单流程&lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;el-timeline&gt;
          &lt;el-timeline-item timestamp=&quot;创建&quot;&gt;工单已创建，等待处理&lt;/el-timeline-item&gt;
          &lt;el-timeline-item v-if=&quot;order.status !== 'pending'&quot; timestamp=&quot;派发&quot;&gt;工单已派发给 {{ order.assignee }}&lt;/el-timeline-item&gt;
          &lt;el-timeline-item v-if=&quot;order.status === 'completed'&quot; timestamp=&quot;完成&quot;&gt;工单已完成&lt;/el-timeline-item&gt;
        &lt;/el-timeline&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;detail-actions&quot;&gt;

          v-if=&quot;order.status === 'pending'&quot; 
          type=&quot;primary&quot; 
          @click=&quot;handleAssign&quot;
        &gt;
          派发工单

      &lt;el-form :model=&quot;assignForm&quot; label-width=&quot;80px&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;处理人员&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;assignForm.assignee&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择处理人员&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;张三&quot; value=&quot;张三&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;李四&quot; value=&quot;李四&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;王五&quot; value=&quot;王五&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;赵六&quot; value=&quot;赵六&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;/el-select&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;

      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;assignDialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;confirmAssign&quot;&gt;确认派发&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/template&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue'
import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router'
import { workOrders } from '@/data/mockData'

const route = useRoute()
const router = useRouter()
const order = ref(null)
const assignDialogVisible = ref(false)
const assignForm = ref({ assignee: '' })

onMounted(() =&gt; {
  const id = route.params.id
  order.value = workOrders.find(w =&gt; w.id === id) || workOrders[0]
})

const getPriorityTagType = (priority) =&gt; {
  switch (priority) {
    case 'high': return 'danger'
    case 'medium': return 'warning'
    case 'low': return 'success'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getPriorityText = (priority) =&gt; {
  switch (priority) {
    case 'high': return '高'
    case 'medium': return '中'
    case 'low': return '低'
    default: return priority
  }
}

const getStatusTagType = (status) =&gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'pending': return 'warning'
    case 'processing': return 'primary'
    case 'completed': return 'success'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'pending': return '待处理'
    case 'processing': return '处理中'
    case 'completed': return '已完成'
    default: return status
  }
}

const handleAssign = () =&gt; {
  assignForm.value = { assignee: '' }
  assignDialogVisible.value = true
}

const confirmAssign = () =&gt; {
  if (!assignForm.value.assignee) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择处理人员')
    return
  }
  
  if (order.value) {
    order.value.assignee = assignForm.value.assignee
    order.value.status = 'processing'
    order.value.updateTime = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN')
  }
  ElMessage.success('派发成功')
  assignDialogVisible.value = false
}

const handleComplete = () =&gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    '确定要完成此工单吗？',
    '提示',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'success'
    }
  ).then(() =&gt; {
    if (order.value) {
      order.value.status = 'completed'
      order.value.updateTime = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN')
    }
    ElMessage.success('工单已完成')
  }).catch(() =&gt; {
    ElMessage.info('已取消')
  })
}
&lt;/script&gt;

  <h2 id="file-48">src/views/workorder/WorkOrderList.vue</h2>
  <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/workorder/WorkOrderList.vue</div>
  <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAdd&quot;&gt;创建工单&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchDelete&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;

    &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;status-tabs&quot;&gt;
        &lt;div 
          v-for=&quot;tab in statusTabs&quot; 
          :key=&quot;tab.value&quot;
          class=&quot;status-tab&quot; 
          :class=&quot;{ active: currentStatus === tab.value }&quot;
          @click=&quot;currentStatus = tab.value&quot;
        &gt;
          {{ tab.label }}({{ tab.count }})
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;filter-inputs&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filterKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入工单名称查询&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;搜索&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;

    &lt;div class=&quot;table-wrapper&quot;&gt;
      &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;工单名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;type&quot; label=&quot;工单类型&quot; width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;creator&quot; label=&quot;创建人&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;isTimeout&quot; label=&quot;是否超时&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;
          &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.isTimeout ? 'danger' : 'success'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
              {{ row.isTimeout ? '是' : '否' }}
            &lt;/el-tag&gt;
          &lt;/template&gt;
        &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;工单状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;
          &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(row.status)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;
              {{ getStatusText(row.status) }}
            &lt;/el-tag&gt;
          &lt;/template&gt;
        &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;createTime&quot; label=&quot;工单发起时间&quot; width=&quot;160&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt;
        &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;200&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;
          &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt;
            &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;/template&gt;
        &lt;/el-table-column&gt;
      &lt;/el-table&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;

    &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;创建工单&quot; v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; width=&quot;600px&quot;&gt;
      &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot; class=&quot;form-container&quot;&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*工单类型&quot; prop=&quot;type&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择工单类型&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;爱克园区巡检&quot; value=&quot;爱克园区巡检&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;11月6号灯具故障模板&quot; value=&quot;11月6号灯具故障模板&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯具故障模板&quot; value=&quot;灯具故障模板&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;单灯故障自动派单&quot; value=&quot;单灯故障自动派单&quot; /&gt;
            &lt;el-option label=&quot;巡检模板&quot; value=&quot;巡检模板&quot; /&gt;
          &lt;/el-select&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*工单名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;&quot; class=&quot;form-input&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;数字输入框&quot; prop=&quot;number&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-input-number v-model=&quot;formData.number&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;9999&quot; /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;日期范围&quot; prop=&quot;dateRange&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-date-picker
            v-model=&quot;formData.dateRange&quot;
            type=&quot;daterange&quot;
            range-separator=&quot;至&quot;
            start-placeholder=&quot;开始日期&quot;
            end-placeholder=&quot;结束日期&quot;
            class=&quot;form-date&quot;
          /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;时间范围&quot; prop=&quot;timeRange&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-time-picker
            v-model=&quot;formData.timeRange&quot;
            is-range
            range-separator=&quot;至&quot;
            start-placeholder=&quot;开始时间&quot;
            end-placeholder=&quot;结束时间&quot;
            class=&quot;form-time&quot;
          /&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
        &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;图片上传&quot; prop=&quot;images&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-upload
            class=&quot;image-uploader&quot;
            action=&quot;#&quot;
            :show-file-list=&quot;false&quot;
            :auto-upload=&quot;false&quot;
          &gt;
            &lt;div class=&quot;upload-placeholder&quot;&gt;
              &lt;el-icon class=&quot;upload-icon&quot;&gt;&lt;Plus /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt;
            &lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;/el-upload&gt;
        &lt;/el-form-item&gt;
      &lt;/el-form&gt;
      &lt;template #footer&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;dialog-footer&quot;&gt;
          &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt;
          &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleConfirm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/template&gt;
    &lt;/el-dialog&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
&lt;/template&gt;

&lt;script setup&gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'

const showAddDialog = ref(false)
const currentStatus = ref('pending')
const filterKeyword = ref('')
const selectedRows = ref([])

const mockData = ref([
  {
    no: 1,
    name: '园区路灯巡检',
    type: '爱克园区巡检',
    creator: '管理员',
    isTimeout: false,
    status: 'pending',
    createTime: '2024-05-15 09:30:00'
  },
  {
    no: 2,
    name: '灯具故障维修',
    type: '灯具故障模板',
    creator: '张三',
    isTimeout: true,
    status: 'processing',
    createTime: '2024-05-14 14:20:00'
  }
])

const statusTabs = computed(() =&gt; [
  { label: '待处理', value: 'pending', count: mockData.value.filter(i =&gt; i.status === 'pending').length },
  { label: '我发起的', value: 'created', count: 2 },
  { label: '已处理的', value: 'processed', count: 0 },
  { label: '抄送我的', value: 'copied', count: 0 },
  { label: '全部工单', value: 'all', count: mockData.value.length }
])

const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; {
  let result = mockData.value
  if (currentStatus.value !== 'all') {
    if (currentStatus.value === 'pending') {
      result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.status === 'pending')
    } else if (currentStatus.value === 'created') {
      result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.creator === '管理员')
    } else if (currentStatus.value === 'processed') {
      result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.status === 'completed')
    }
  }
  if (filterKeyword.value) {
    result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.name.includes(filterKeyword.value))
  }
  return result
})

const formData = ref({
  type: '',
  name: '',
  number: 0,
  dateRange: [],
  timeRange: [],
  images: []
})

const getStatusTagType = (status) =&gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'pending': return 'warning'
    case 'processing': return 'primary'
    case 'completed': return 'success'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'pending': return '待处理'
    case 'processing': return '处理中'
    case 'completed': return '已完成'
    default: return status
  }
}

const handleAdd = () =&gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true
  formData.value = {
    type: '',
    name: '',
    number: 0,
    dateRange: [],
    timeRange: [],
    images: []
  }
}

const handleSearch = () =&gt; {}

const handleReset = () =&gt; {
  filterKeyword.value = ''
}

const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&gt; {
  selectedRows.value = val
}

const handleDetail = (row) =&gt; {}
const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; {}
const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; {
  const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no)
  if (index !== -1) {
    mockData.value.splice(index, 1)
  }
}
const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; {
  selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; {
    const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no)
    if (index !== -1) {
      mockData.value.splice(index, 1)
    }
  })
  selectedRows.value = []
}

const handleConfirm = () =&gt; {
  if (!formData.value.type || !formData.value.name) {
    alert('请填写必填字段')
    return
  }
  const newRecord = {
    no: mockData.value.length + 1,
    name: formData.value.name,
    type: formData.value.type,
    creator: '管理员',
    isTimeout: false,
    status: 'pending',
    createTime: new Date().toLocaleString()
  }
  mockData.value.push(newRecord)
  showAddDialog.value = false
}
&lt;/script&gt;

  <h2 id="file-49">update-hierarchy.js</h2>
  <div class="file-info">文件路径: update-hierarchy.js</div>
  <div class="code-block">import fs from 'fs/promises';
import path from 'path';

// 需要更新的文件列表
const files = [
  './src/views/device/LampPostManage.vue',
  './src/views/power/CircuitGroup.vue',
  './src/views/power/LineInfo.vue',
  './src/views/power/CircuitControl.vue',
  './src/views/power/CentralControl.vue',
  './src/views/power/DistributionBox.vue',
  './src/views/lighting/LampManage.vue',
  './src/views/lighting/GroupManage.vue',
  './src/views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue',
  './src/views/lighting/HistoryStrategy.vue'
];

// 替换规则
const replacements = [
  { from: /爱克股份产业园/g, to: '长沙' },
  { from: /园区地面/g, to: '岳麓区' },
  { from: /1栋地面/g, to: '先导路' },
  { from: /1栋/g, to: '力唯中天1栋' },
  { from: /4栋/g, to: '力唯中天2栋' },
  { from: /园区290/g, to: '岳麓区290号' },
  { from: /展厅集控/g, to: '先导路集控' }
];

async function updateFiles() {
  for (const filePath of files) {
    const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), filePath);
    
    try {
      const content = await fs.readFile(fullPath, 'utf8');
      
      // 应用所有替换规则
      let newContent = content;
      replacements.forEach(replace =&gt; {
        newContent = newContent.replace(replace.from, replace.to);
      });
      
      await fs.writeFile(fullPath, newContent, 'utf8');
      console.log(`✅ 更新成功: ${filePath}`);
    } catch (error) {
      console.log(`❌ 文件不存在或读取失败: ${filePath}`);
    }
  }
  
  console.log('\n🎉 所有层级数据已更新完成！');
}

updateFiles();
</div>
  <hr class="section-divider">

import vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue'
import { resolve } from 'path'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [vue()],
  resolve: {
    alias: {
      '@': resolve(__dirname, 'src')
    }
  }
})

  &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: package.json&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;{
  &amp;quot;name&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;smart-lighting-system&amp;quot;,
  &amp;quot;version&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;1.0.0&amp;quot;,

              &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.ipAddress&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入IP地址&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;端口号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;port&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.port&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入端口号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;

      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;

    &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;详情&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDetailDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; :data=&amp;quot;detailData&amp;quot; border&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属产品&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.product }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.model }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;摄像头类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.cameraType }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属层级&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.level }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.lampPost }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备经度&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.longitude }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备纬度&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.latitude }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;IP地址&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.ipAddress }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;端口号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.port }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            {{ detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }}
          &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;最后在线时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.lastOnline }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';
import { Search, MapLocation } from '@element-plus/icons-vue';

const treeSearch = ref('');
const filterProduct = ref('');
const filterKeyword = ref('');
const filterNetworkStatus = ref('');
const currentPage = ref(1);
const pageSize = ref(15);
const selectedRows = ref([]);
const showAddDialog = ref(false);
const showDetailDialog = ref(false);
const formData = ref({
  product: '',
  deviceNo: '',
  name: '',
  model: '',
  cameraType: '枪机',
  level: '',
  lampPost: '',
  longitude: '',
  latitude: '',
  ipAddress: '',
  port: ''
});
const detailData = ref({});

const treeData = ref([
  {
    id: 1,
    label: '长沙',
    children: [
      {
        id: 2,
        label: '岳麓区',
        children: [
          { id: 3, label: '先导路' },
          { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
]);

const defaultProps = {
  children: 'children',
  label: 'label'
};

const mockData = ref([
  { no: 1, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: 'd31c52e77ed045db87', name: '特种照明', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-01-10 19:10:00' },
  { no: 2, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: '66c0443f92f94d0ebce', name: '展厅入口', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-01-10 19:10:00' },
  { no: 3, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: 'df56e1193c464153bf1', name: '路灯全景', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' },
  { no: 4, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: '5dfe7819888140f9b7d', name: '路灯大屏', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' },
  { no: 5, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: '2572900662644fe7b0d', name: '隧道直筒摄像头', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' },
  { no: 6, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: 'a41b5ab812454bc69f3', name: '思科来展厅', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' },
  { no: 7, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: 'f05921c29d02420b90d', name: '展会监控', deviceType: '半球', lampPost: '光亚展灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-07-11 10:40:00' },
  { no: 8, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '199b98f8b87d498ab03', name: '展厅入口', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' },
  { no: 9, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '199b98f8b87d498ab03', name: '路灯展厅操作区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '1号楼-极简05', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' },
  { no: 10, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '4606f32216694897a26', name: '路灯展厅灯杆区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '2号楼-极简08', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' },
  { no: 11, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '30faa1258de945c7acd', name: '路灯展厅隧道区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' },
  { no: 12, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '1f7a35628d3a4c718f6', name: '路灯展厅模组区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' }
]);

const total = computed(() =&amp;gt; mockData.value.length);

const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  let data = [...mockData.value];
  if (filterProduct.value) {
    data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.product === filterProduct.value);
  }
  if (filterKeyword.value) {
    const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase();
    data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) || item.deviceNo.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
  }
  if (filterNetworkStatus.value) {
    data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value);
  }
  return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value);
});

const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1;
};

const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; {
  filterProduct.value = '';
  filterKeyword.value = '';
  filterNetworkStatus.value = '';
  currentPage.value = 1;
};

const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value = val;
};

const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true;
  formData.value = {
    product: '',
    deviceNo: '',
    name: '',
    model: '',
    cameraType: '枪机',
    level: '',
    lampPost: '',
    longitude: '',
    latitude: '',
    ipAddress: '',
    port: ''
  };
};

const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true;
  formData.value = { ...row };
};

const handleDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  showDetailDialog.value = true;
  detailData.value = { ...row };
};

const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo);
  if (index !== -1) {
    mockData.value.splice(index, 1);
  }
};

const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; {
    const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo);
    if (index !== -1) {
      mockData.value.splice(index, 1);
    }
  });
  selectedRows.value = [];
};

const handleConfirm = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.product || !formData.value.deviceNo || !formData.value.name || !formData.value.cameraType || !formData.value.level) {
    alert('请填写所有必填字段');
    return;
  }
  const newRecord = {
    no: mockData.value.length + 1,
    product: formData.value.product,
    deviceNo: formData.value.deviceNo,
    name: formData.value.name,
    deviceType: formData.value.cameraType,
    lampPost: formData.value.lampPost || '-',
    networkStatus: 'online',
    lastOnline: new Date().toLocaleString()
  };
  mockData.value.push(newRecord);
  showAddDialog.value = false;
};

const handleSizeChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  pageSize.value = val;
  currentPage.value = 1;
};

const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = val;
};
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;安装信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.location&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入安装位置&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;installDate&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-date-picker 
            v-model=&amp;quot;formData.installDate&amp;quot; 
            type=&amp;quot;date&amp;quot; 
            placeholder=&amp;quot;选择安装日期&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备参数&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定电压(V)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;voltage&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.voltage&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入额定电压&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定功率(W)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.power&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入额定功率&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;formData.brightness&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; :step=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;维护信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;上次维护日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;lastMaintenance&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-date-picker 
            v-model=&amp;quot;formData.lastMaintenance&amp;quot; 
            type=&amp;quot;date&amp;quot; 
            placeholder=&amp;quot;选择维护日期&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;备注信息&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;remark&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-textarea v-model=&amp;quot;formData.remark&amp;quot; rows=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入备注信息&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/device/list&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitForm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;提交&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'

const router = useRouter()
const formData = ref({
  id: '',
  name: '',
  model: '',
  type: '',
  location: '',
  installDate: '',
  voltage: 220,
  power: 150,
  brightness: 80,
  lastMaintenance: '',
  remark: '',
  status: 'offline'
})

const generateId = () =&amp;gt; {
  const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase()
  return 'DVC' + timestamp.slice(-3) + String(Math.random()).slice(-3).toUpperCase()
}

const submitForm = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.model || !formData.value.type || !formData.value.location) {
    ElMessage.warning('请填写必填项')
    return
  }
  
  formData.value.id = generateId()
  ElMessage.success('设备添加成功')
  router.push('/device/list')
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;
.device-form {
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

  margin-bottom: 25px;
  padding: 20px;
  background: #fafafa;
  border-radius: 8px;
}

  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  color: #333;
}

.form-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 15px;
  justify-content: center;
  padding-top: 20px;
}

  &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-11&quot;&gt;src/views/device/DeviceDetail.vue&lt;/h2&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/device/DeviceDetail.vue&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备详情&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/device/list&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;返回列表&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;device&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;device-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;h2&amp;gt;{{ device.name }}&amp;lt;/h2&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(device.status)&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;status-tag&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            {{ getStatusText(device.status) }}
          &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;device-id&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备编号: {{ device.id }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-grid&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;基本信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.model }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.type }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.location }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装日期&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.installDate }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备参数&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定电压&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.voltage }}V&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定功率&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.power }}W&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;当前亮度&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;device.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item v-if=&amp;quot;device.faultReason&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;故障原因&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-tag type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.faultReason }}&amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;维护信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;上次维护&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.lastMaintenance }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;下次维护&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-tag type=&amp;quot;info&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ getNextMaintenance(device.lastMaintenance) }}&amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;router-link :to=&amp;quot;'/device/add'&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot;&amp;gt;复制新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;goBack&amp;quot;&amp;gt;返回列表&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue'
import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router'
import { deviceList } from '@/data/mockData'

const route = useRoute()
const router = useRouter()
const device = ref(null)

onMounted(() =&amp;gt; {
  const id = route.params.id
  device.value = deviceList.find(d =&amp;gt; d.id === id) || deviceList[0]
})

const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'online': return 'success'
    case 'offline': return 'info'
    case 'fault': return 'danger'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'online': return '在线'
    case 'offline': return '离线'
    case 'fault': return '故障'
    default: return status
  }
}

const getNextMaintenance = (lastDate) =&amp;gt; {
  if (!lastDate) return '未维护'
  const date = new Date(lastDate)
  date.setMonth(date.getMonth() + 3)
  return date.toISOString().split('T')[0]
}

const goBack = () =&amp;gt; {
  router.push('/device/list')
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

  border-radius: 8px;
  color: #fff;
}

  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 15px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

  font-size: 24px;
}

.status-tag {
  font-size: 12px;
}

.device-id {
  font-size: 14px;
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.detail-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.detail-card {
  background: #fff;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
}

.card-title {
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
  color: #333;

  display: flex;
  gap: 15px;
  justify-content: center;

      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;editDialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;saveEdit&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { deviceList } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Plus }
const statusFilter = ref('')
const searchKeyword = ref('')
const editDialogVisible = ref(false)
const formData = ref({})

const tableData = ref([...deviceList])

const totalCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.length)
const onlineCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'online').length)
const offlineCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'offline').length)
const faultCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'fault').length)

const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  return tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; {
    const statusMatch = !statusFilter.value || item.status === statusFilter.value
    const keywordMatch = !searchKeyword.value || 
      item.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) ||
      item.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase())
    return statusMatch &amp;amp;&amp;amp; keywordMatch
  })
})

const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'online': return 'success'
    case 'offline': return 'info'
    case 'fault': return 'danger'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'online': return '在线'
    case 'offline': return '离线'
    case 'fault': return '故障'
    default: return status
  }
}

const editDevice = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  formData.value = { ...row }
  editDialogVisible.value = true
}

const deleteDevice = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    '确定要删除该设备吗？',
    '提示',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    const index = tableData.value.findIndex(d =&amp;gt; d.id === row.id)
    if (index &amp;gt; -1) {
      tableData.value.splice(index, 1)
    }
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {
    ElMessage.info('已取消删除')
  })
}

const saveEdit = () =&amp;gt; {
  const index = tableData.value.findIndex(d =&amp;gt; d.id === formData.value.id)
  if (index &amp;gt; -1) {
    tableData.value[index] = { ...formData.value }
  }
  ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  editDialogVisible.value = false
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;
.stats-card {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.stat-item {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  text-align: center;
  
  &amp;amp;.online {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #11998e 0%, #38ef7d 100%);
  }
  
  &amp;amp;.offline {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%);
  }
  
  &amp;amp;.fault {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ee5a24 100%);
  }
  
  &amp;amp;.total {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  }
}

.stat-value {
  display: block;
  font-size: 32px;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
  color: #fff;
}

.stat-label {
  font-size: 14px;
  opacity: 0.9;
  color: #fff;
}

.filter-bar {
  display: flex;
  gap: 15px;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.filter-select {
  width: 150px;
}

.filter-input {
  width: 250px;
}

.data-table {
  width: 100%;
}

  text-decoration: none;
}
