      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;sendTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;下发时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;operator&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;下发人员&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;关联设备数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;successCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;成功数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;span style=&amp;quot;color: #52c41a; font-weight: 500;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ row.successCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;failCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;失败数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;span style=&amp;quot;color: #f5222d; font-weight: 500;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ row.failCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行结果&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(row.status)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            {{ getStatusText(row.status) }}
          &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;260&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleCopy(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;复制&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;info&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleExportSingle(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;导出&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;default&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查看详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt;

    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-pagination
        v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot;
        v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot;
        :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot;
        :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot;
        layout=&amp;quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&amp;quot;
        @size-change=&amp;quot;handleSizeChange&amp;quot;
        @current-change=&amp;quot;handleCurrentChange&amp;quot;
      /&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

    &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;detailVisible&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;策略执行详情&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;900px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;currentRecord&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; border&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentRecord.strategyName }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;下发时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentRecord.sendTime }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;下发人员&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentRecord.operator }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;执行结果&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(currentRecord.status)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              {{ getStatusText(currentRecord.status) }}
            &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;关联设备数&amp;quot; :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentRecord.deviceCount }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;activeTab&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-tabs&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;策略配置&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;config&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;config-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; border&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;策略类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ getTypeText(currentRecord.strategyType) }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;执行动作&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ getActionText(currentRecord.action) }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentRecord.executeTime || '-' }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;策略描述&amp;quot; :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentRecord.description || '-' }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;关联设备&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;devices&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;device-list&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;currentRecord.devices&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; border&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;imei&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;IMEI号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;result&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行结果&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.result === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                      {{ row.result === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }}
                    &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;message&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;消息&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;执行日志&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;logs&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;log-list&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;currentRecord.logs&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; border&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.type === 'info' ? '' : (row.type === 'warning' ? 'warning' : 'danger')&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                      {{ row.type === 'info' ? '信息' : (row.type === 'warning' ? '警告' : '错误') }}
                    &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;content&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;内容&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-tabs&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleCopy(currentRecord)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;复制策略&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;detailVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关闭&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;

    &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;copyVisible&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;复制策略&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-form ref=&amp;quot;copyFormRef&amp;quot; :model=&amp;quot;copyForm&amp;quot; :rules=&amp;quot;copyRules&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;原策略名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;{{ copyForm.originalName }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;新策略名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;copyForm.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入新策略名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;策略类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;copyForm.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择策略类型&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;定时策略&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光感策略&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;light&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;手动策略&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;manual&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;executeTime&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;copyForm.executeTime&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入执行时间&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;copyVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitCopy&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
import { Refresh, Search, Download } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
import router from '@/router'

const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(10)
const total = ref(0)
const selectedRows = ref([])
const detailVisible = ref(false)
const copyVisible = ref(false)
const currentRecord = ref(null)
const copyFormRef = ref(null)
const activeTab = ref('config')

const filters = reactive({
  name: '',
  status: '',
  dateRange: []
})

const copyForm = reactive({
  originalName: '',
  name: '',
  type: '',
  executeTime: ''
})

const copyRules = {
  name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入新策略名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择策略类型', trigger: 'change' }],
  executeTime: [{ required: true, message: '请输入执行时间', trigger: 'blur' }]
}

const records = ref([
  {
    id: 1,
    strategyName: '城市主干道夜间照明',
    strategyType: 'time',
    action: 'dim',
    executeTime: '每日18:00-次日06:00',
    description: '城市主干道夜间照明策略，亮度调节为70%',
    sendTime: '2024-04-28 17:30:00',
    operator: 'admin',
    deviceCount: 50,
    successCount: 48,
    failCount: 2,
    status: 'partial',
    devices: [
      { no: 1, name: '先导路01号灯', imei: '862715067560391', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' },
      { no: 2, name: '先导路02号灯', imei: '863123069184162', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' },
      { no: 3, name: '先导路03号灯', imei: '863123069133946', result: 'fail', message: '设备离线' },
      { no: 4, name: '先导路04号灯', imei: '863123069031165', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' },
      { no: 5, name: '力唯中天1栋大堂灯', imei: '863123069267413', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' }
    ],
    logs: [
      { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:00', type: 'info', content: '开始执行策略' },
      { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:01', type: 'info', content: '连接50个设备' },
      { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:05', type: 'warning', content: '先导路03号灯连接超时' },
      { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:10', type: 'info', content: '策略执行完成' }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    strategyName: '园区展厅照明',
    strategyType: 'time',
    action: 'on',
    executeTime: '工作日08:00-22:00',
    description: '园区展厅照明策略，营业时间全亮',
    sendTime: '2024-04-28 07:55:00',
    operator: 'admin',
    deviceCount: 20,
    successCount: 20,
    failCount: 0,
    status: 'success',
    devices: [
      { no: 1, name: '展厅主灯', imei: '863123069265714', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' },
      { no: 2, name: '展厅侧灯', imei: '863123069201446', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' }
    ],
    logs: [
      { time: '2024-04-28 07:55:00', type: 'info', content: '开始执行策略' },
      { time: '2024-04-28 07:55:02', type: 'info', content: '连接20个设备' },
      { time: '2024-04-28 07:55:08', type: 'info', content: '策略执行完成' }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    strategyName: '园区照明光感控制',
    strategyType: 'light',
    action: 'dim',
    executeTime: '根据光线自动调节',
    description: '根据光线强度自动开关灯，自动调节亮度',
    sendTime: '2024-04-27 18:00:00',
    operator: 'operator',
    deviceCount: 35,
    successCount: 35,
    failCount: 0,
    status: 'success',
    devices: [],
    logs: []
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    strategyName: '特殊活动照明',
    strategyType: 'manual',
    action: 'on',
    executeTime: '手动控制',
    description: '特殊活动时使用的照明策略',
    sendTime: '2024-04-26 20:00:00',
    operator: 'operator',
    deviceCount: 10,
    successCount: 0,
    failCount: 10,
    status: 'fail',
    devices: [],
    logs: []
  }
])

total.value = records.value.length

const filteredRecords = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  let result = records.value
  if (filters.name) {
    result = result.filter(r =&amp;gt; r.strategyName.includes(filters.name))
  }
  if (filters.status) {
    result = result.filter(r =&amp;gt; r.status === filters.status)
  }
  return result
})

const getTypeText = (type) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { time: '定时策略', light: '光感策略', manual: '手动策略' }
  return map[type] || type
}

const getActionText = (action) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { on: '开灯', off: '关灯', dim: '调光' }
  return map[action] || action
}

const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { success: '成功', partial: '部分成功', fail: '失败' }
  return map[status] || status
}

const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { success: 'success', partial: 'warning', fail: 'danger' }
  return map[status] || ''
}

const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value = selection
}

const searchRecords = () =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const resetFilters = () =&amp;gt; {
  Object.assign(filters, {
    name: '',
    status: '',
    dateRange: []
  })
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessage.success('数据已刷新')
}

const viewDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  currentRecord.value = row
  detailVisible.value = true
  activeTab.value = 'config'
}

const handleCopy = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  currentRecord.value = row
  Object.assign(copyForm, {
    originalName: row.strategyName,
    name: row.strategyName + ' (副本)',
    type: row.strategyType,
    executeTime: row.executeTime
  })
  copyVisible.value = true
}

const submitCopy = async () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!copyFormRef.value) return
  await copyFormRef.value.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; {
    if (valid) {
      ElMessage.success(`策略「${copyForm.name}」复制成功`)
      copyVisible.value = false
      router.push('/lighting/strategy')
    }
  })
}

const handleExportSingle = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessage.success(`正在导出「${row.strategyName}」的执行记录...`)
  setTimeout(() =&amp;gt; {
    ElMessage.success('导出成功，文件已开始下载')
  }, 500)
}

const handleExport = () =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要导出选中的${selectedRows.value.length}条记录吗？`, '提示', {
    confirmButtonText: '确定',
    cancelButtonText: '取消',
    type: 'info'
  }).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    ElMessage.success('正在导出...')
    setTimeout(() =&amp;gt; {
      ElMessage.success('导出成功，Excel文件已开始下载')
    }, 500)
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {})
}

const handleSizeChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  pageSize.value = val
}

const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = val
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;
.page-container {
  padding: 20px;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  padding-bottom: 15px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
}

.page-header .title {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1f1f1f;
}

.header-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: center;
}

.filter-bar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 15px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  padding: 15px;
  background: #fafafa;
  border-radius: 4px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.filter-input {
  width: 200px;
}

.filter-select {
  width: 150px;
}

.filter-date {
  width: 300px;
}

.record-table {
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.pagination-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.detail-content {
  padding: 10px 0;
}

.detail-tabs {
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.config-content,
.device-list,
.log-list {
  margin-top: 15px;
}

              &amp;lt;template #dropdown&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-dropdown-menu&amp;gt;

              &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

            &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;selectedItem.lampStatus === 'on' ? 'success' : 'warning'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              {{ selectedItem.lampStatus === 'on' ? '开' : '关' }}

          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;selectedItem.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              {{ selectedItem.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }}
            &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;最后在线&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedItem.lastOnline }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;当前策略&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedItem.currentStrategy }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;可用状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;selectedItem.enabled ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              {{ selectedItem.enabled ? '启用' : '不启用' }}
            &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;

    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'

const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(15)
const total = ref(68)
const searchKeyword = ref('')
const filterProduct = ref('')
const filterLampStatus = ref('')
const filterNetworkStatus = ref('')
const filterEnabled = ref('')
const showDimmingDialog = ref(false)
const showDetailDialog = ref(false)
const brightnessValue = ref(80)
const selectedRows = ref([])
const selectedItem = ref(null)
const treeSearch = ref('')

const defaultProps = {
  label: 'label',
  children: 'children'
}

const treeData = ref([
  {
    id: 1,
    label: '长沙',
    children: [
      {
        id: 2,
        label: '岳麓区',
        children: [
          { id: 3, label: '先导路' },
          { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
])

const lampData = ref([

  { id: 13, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069231120', name: '1号楼-极简05', power: 44, voltage: 234.3, current: 202, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-23 17:45:55', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  { id: 14, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066361359', name: '展示0204Z05', power: 232, voltage: 237.9, current: 999, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-09 21:19:55', currentStrategy: '-', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true }
])

const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  let result = lampData.value
  if (filterProduct.value) {
    result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.product === filterProduct.value)
  }
  if (filterLampStatus.value) {
    result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.lampStatus === filterLampStatus.value)
  }
  if (filterNetworkStatus.value) {
    result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value)
  }
  if (filterEnabled.value) {
    result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; filterEnabled.value === 'enabled' ? item.enabled : !item.enabled)
  }
  if (searchKeyword.value) {
    result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; 
      item.imei.includes(searchKeyword.value) || 
      item.name.includes(searchKeyword.value)
    )
  }
  return result
})

const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value = selection
}

const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; {
  searchKeyword.value = ''
  filterProduct.value = ''
  filterLampStatus.value = ''
  filterNetworkStatus.value = ''
  filterEnabled.value = ''
}

const handleTurnOn = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择要控制的灯具')
    return
  }
  ElMessage.success(`已开启 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具`)
}

const handleTurnOff = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择要控制的灯具')
    return
  }
  ElMessage.success(`已关闭 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具`)
}

const handleDimming = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择要调光的灯具')
    return
  }
  ElMessage.success(`已将 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具亮度设置为 ${brightnessValue.value}%`)
  showDimmingDialog.value = false
}

const handleDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedItem.value = row
  showDetailDialog.value = true
}

const handleMore = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessage.info(`更多操作: ${row.name}`)
}

const handleViewSwitchRecord = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessage.info(`查看 ${row.name} 的开关灯记录`)
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

          @click=&amp;quot;selectArea(area.id)&amp;quot;
        &amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;area.icon&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;area-icon&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;

      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;控制操作&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-btn-group&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;large&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;controlAll('on')&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Power&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
              全部开启
            &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;large&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;controlAll('off')&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.PowerOff&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
              全部关闭
            &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;brightness-control&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;control-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮度调节&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;brightness-slider&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-slider 
                v-model=&amp;quot;brightnessValue&amp;quot; 
                :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; 
                :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; 
                :step=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot;
                @change=&amp;quot;onBrightnessChange&amp;quot;
              /&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;brightness-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ brightnessValue }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;quick-buttons&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-button v-for=&amp;quot;level in brightnessLevels&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;level&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;setBrightness(level)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                {{ level }}%
              &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;路灯列表&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredLights&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;55&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;路灯名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;location&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(scope.row.status)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              {{ getStatusText(scope.row.status) }}
            &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;功率(W)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button 
              size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; 
              :type=&amp;quot;scope.row.status === 'on' ? 'default' : 'primary'&amp;quot;
              @click=&amp;quot;toggleLight(scope.row)&amp;quot;
            &amp;gt;
              {{ scope.row.status === 'on' ? '关闭' : '开启' }}
            &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;adjustBrightness(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;调亮度&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;亮度调节&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;brightnessDialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;400px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;currentLight&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;brightness-dialog&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;light-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentLight.name }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-slider 
          v-model=&amp;quot;currentBrightness&amp;quot; 
          :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; 
          :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; 
          :step=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot;
          show-input
        /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;brightnessDialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;confirmBrightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确认&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { VideoPlay, VideoPause, Grid, MapLocation } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { lightStatusData } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Power: VideoPlay, PowerOff: VideoPause, Batch: Grid, MapPin: MapLocation }
const selectedArea = ref('all')
const brightnessValue = ref(80)
const brightnessDialogVisible = ref(false)
const currentLight = ref(null)
const currentBrightness = ref(80)
const selectedLights = ref([])

const areas = [
  { id: 'all', name: '全部区域', icon: MapLocation },
  { id: 'zhongshan', name: '中山路', icon: MapLocation },
  { id: 'renmin', name: '人民路', icon: MapLocation },
  { id: 'jiefang', name: '解放路', icon: MapLocation },
  { id: 'gongyuan', name: '公园路', icon: MapLocation },
  { id: 'wenhua', name: '文化路', icon: MapLocation }
]

const brightnessLevels = [30, 50, 70, 85, 100]

const tableData = ref([...lightStatusData])

const filteredLights = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  if (selectedArea.value === 'all') return tableData.value
  const areaMap = {
    zhongshan: '中山路',
    renmin: '人民路',
    jiefang: '解放路',
    gongyuan: '公园路',
    wenhua: '文化路'
  }
  return tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.location.includes(areaMap[selectedArea.value]))
})

const getAreaCount = (areaId) =&amp;gt; {
  if (areaId === 'all') return tableData.value.length
  const areaMap = {
    zhongshan: '中山路',
    renmin: '人民路',
    jiefang: '解放路',
    gongyuan: '公园路',
    wenhua: '文化路'
  }
  return tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.location.includes(areaMap[areaId])).length
}

const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'on': return 'success'
    case 'off': return 'info'
    case 'fault': return 'danger'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'on': return '开启'
    case 'off': return '关闭'
    case 'fault': return '故障'
    default: return status
  }
}

const selectArea = (areaId) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedArea.value = areaId
}

const controlAll = (action) =&amp;gt; {
  filteredLights.value.forEach(light =&amp;gt; {
    if (light.status !== 'fault') {
      light.status = action
      light.brightness = action === 'on' ? brightnessValue.value : 0
    }
  })
}

const toggleLight = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  if (row.status === 'fault') return
  row.status = row.status === 'on' ? 'off' : 'on'
  row.brightness = row.status === 'on' ? brightnessValue.value : 0
}

const onBrightnessChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  filteredLights.value.forEach(light =&amp;gt; {
    if (light.status === 'on') {
      light.brightness = val
    }
  })
}

const setBrightness = (level) =&amp;gt; {
  brightnessValue.value = level
  onBrightnessChange(level)
}

const adjustBrightness = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  if (row.status === 'fault') return
  currentLight.value = row
  currentBrightness.value = row.brightness
  brightnessDialogVisible.value = true
}

const confirmBrightness = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (currentLight.value &amp;amp;&amp;amp; currentLight.value.status !== 'fault') {
    currentLight.value.brightness = currentBrightness.value
    if (currentLight.value.status === 'off') {
      currentLight.value.status = 'on'
    }
  }
  brightnessDialogVisible.value = false
}

const batchControl = () =&amp;gt; {
  selectedLights.value.forEach(id =&amp;gt; {
    const light = tableData.value.find(l =&amp;gt; l.id === id)
    if (light &amp;amp;&amp;amp; light.status !== 'fault') {
      light.status = 'on'
      light.brightness = brightnessValue.value
    }
  })
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;功率(W)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lastUpdate&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;更新时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewDetail(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;路灯详情&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;detailDialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;selectedLight&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.id }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;路灯名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.name }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.location }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;当前状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(selectedLight.status)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              {{ getStatusText(selectedLight.status) }}
            &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;亮度&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;selectedLight.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;功率&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.power }}W&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;最后更新&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.lastUpdate }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Refresh } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { lightStatusData } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Refresh }
const statusFilter = ref('')
const searchKeyword = ref('')
const detailDialogVisible = ref(false)
const selectedLight = ref(null)

const tableData = ref([...lightStatusData])

const totalCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.length)
const onlineCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'on').length)
const offlineCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'off').length)
const faultCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'fault').length)

const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  return tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; {
    const statusMatch = !statusFilter.value || item.status === statusFilter.value
    const keywordMatch = !searchKeyword.value || 
      item.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) ||
      item.location.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase())
    return statusMatch &amp;amp;&amp;amp; keywordMatch
  })
})

const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'on': return 'success'
    case 'off': return 'info'
    case 'fault': return 'danger'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'on': return '开启'
    case 'off': return '关闭'
    case 'fault': return '故障'
    default: return status
  }
}

const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; {
  tableData.value = [...lightStatusData]
}

const viewDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedLight.value = row
  detailDialogVisible.value = true
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;

}

  padding: 20px;

  color: #fff;

}

}

  margin-left: 10px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #666;
}

  padding: 10px 0;
}

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, reactive } from 'vue'
import { Refresh, Postcard, Cpu, Sunrise, Timer } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'

const dateRange = ref([])
const lightingRate = ref(98.5)

const statistics = reactive({
  poleCount: 1256,
  controllerCount: 1256,
  lampCount: 2512,
  onlineRate: 99.2
})

const energy = reactive({
  yesterday: 4521.8,
  thisWeek: 31652.6,
  thisMonth: 135862.4,
  thisYear: 1623458.8
})

const switchTime = reactive({
  on: '18:30',
  off: '06:15'
})

const alerts = reactive({
  today: 12,
  recovered: 8,
  continuing: 4
})

const faultAnalysis = reactive({
  comm: 35,
  lamp: 28,
  power: 22,
  other: 15
})

const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; {
  console.log('刷新数据')
}

          &amp;lt;el-input

          &amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择策略类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot; clearable&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;定时策略&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光感策略&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;light&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;手动策略&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;manual&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.status&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择执行状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot; clearable&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;未下发&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;not_issued&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;已下发&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;issued&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;暂停&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;paused&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;过期&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;expired&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;searchStrategies&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;resetFilters&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredStrategies&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;strategy-table&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;55&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getTypeTagType(row.type)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                {{ getTypeText(row.type) }}
              &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;executeTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(row.status)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                {{ getStatusText(row.status) }}
              &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;220&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;success&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleIssue(row)&amp;quot; v-if=&amp;quot;row.status === 'not_issued'&amp;quot;&amp;gt;下发&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handlePause(row)&amp;quot; v-if=&amp;quot;row.status === 'issued'&amp;quot;&amp;gt;暂停&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;info&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-pagination
            v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot;
            v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot;
            :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot;
            :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot;
            layout=&amp;quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&amp;quot;
            @size-change=&amp;quot;handleSizeChange&amp;quot;
            @current-change=&amp;quot;handleCurrentChange&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

    &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;detailVisible&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;策略详情&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-descriptions v-if=&amp;quot;currentStrategy&amp;quot; :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; border&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;策略类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getTypeTagType(currentStrategy.type)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            {{ getTypeText(currentStrategy.type) }}
          &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.executeTime }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;执行状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(currentStrategy.status)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            {{ getStatusText(currentStrategy.status) }}
          &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;描述&amp;quot; :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.description }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;detailVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关闭&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
import { Refresh, Search, Promotion, VideoPause } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'

const searchTreeText = ref('')
const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(10)
const total = ref(0)
const selectedRows = ref([])
const detailVisible = ref(false)
const currentStrategy = ref(null)

const filters = reactive({
  name: '',
  type: '',
  status: ''
})

const defaultProps = {
  children: 'children',
  label: 'label'
}

const treeData = ref([
  {
    id: 1,
    label: '长沙',
    children: [
      { 
        id: 11, 
        label: '岳麓区',
        children: [
          { id: 111, label: '先导路' },
          { id: 112, label: '力唯中天1栋' }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
])

const strategies = ref([
  { id: 1, no: 1, name: '城市主干道夜间照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '每日18:00-次日06:00', status: 'issued', description: '城市主干道夜间照明策略，亮度调节为70%' },
  { id: 2, no: 2, name: '园区展厅照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '工作日08:00-22:00', status: 'issued', description: '园区展厅照明策略，营业时间全亮' },
  { id: 3, no: 3, name: '园区照明光感控制', type: 'light', executeTime: '根据光线自动调节', status: 'paused', description: '根据光线强度自动开关灯，自动调节亮度' },
  { id: 4, no: 4, name: '特殊活动照明', type: 'manual', executeTime: '手动控制', status: 'not_issued', description: '特殊活动时使用的照明策略' },
  { id: 5, no: 5, name: '节假日照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '节假日全天', status: 'expired', description: '节假日照明策略' },
  { id: 6, no: 6, name: '景观灯照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '每晚19:00-23:00', status: 'issued', description: '景观灯照明策略' },
  { id: 7, no: 7, name: '地下车库照明', type: 'light', executeTime: '根据光线自动调节', status: 'issued', description: '地下车库照明策略' }
])

total.value = strategies.value.length

const filteredStrategies = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  let result = strategies.value
  if (filters.name) {
    result = result.filter(s =&amp;gt; s.name.includes(filters.name))
  }
  if (filters.type) {
    result = result.filter(s =&amp;gt; s.type === filters.type)
  }
  if (filters.status) {
    result = result.filter(s =&amp;gt; s.status === filters.status)
  }
  return result
})

const getTypeText = (type) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { time: '定时策略', light: '光感策略', manual: '手动策略' }
  return map[type] || type
}

const getTypeTagType = (type) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { time: 'primary', light: 'success', manual: 'warning' }
  return map[type] || ''
}

const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { not_issued: '未下发', issued: '已下发', paused: '暂停', expired: '过期' }
  return map[status] || status
}

const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { not_issued: 'info', issued: 'success', paused: 'warning', expired: 'danger' }
  return map[status] || ''
}

const handleCheckChange = (data, checked) =&amp;gt; {
  console.log('selected hierarchy:', data, checked)
}

const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value = selection
}

const searchStrategies = () =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const resetFilters = () =&amp;gt; {
  Object.assign(filters, {
    name: '',
    type: '',
    status: ''
  })
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessage.success('数据已刷新')
}

const viewDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  currentStrategy.value = row
  detailVisible.value = true
}

const handleIssue = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要下发策略「${row.name}」吗？`, '提示', {
    confirmButtonText: '确定',
    cancelButtonText: '取消',
    type: 'primary'
  }).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    row.status = 'issued'
    ElMessage.success(`策略「${row.name}」下发成功`)
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {})
}

const handlePause = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要暂停策略「${row.name}」吗？`, '提示', {
    confirmButtonText: '确定',
    cancelButtonText: '取消',
    type: 'warning'
  }).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    row.status = 'paused'
    ElMessage.success(`策略「${row.name}」已暂停`)
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {})
}

const handleBatchIssue = () =&amp;gt; {
  const notIssuedCount = selectedRows.value.filter(r =&amp;gt; r.status === 'not_issued').length
  if (notIssuedCount === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择未下发的策略')
    return
  }
  ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要批量下发选中的 ${notIssuedCount} 个策略吗？`, '提示', {
    confirmButtonText: '确定',
    cancelButtonText: '取消',
    type: 'primary'
  }).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; {
      if (row.status === 'not_issued') {
        row.status = 'issued'
      }
    })
    ElMessage.success(`已成功下发 ${notIssuedCount} 个策略`)
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {})
}

const handleBatchPause = () =&amp;gt; {
  const issuedCount = selectedRows.value.filter(r =&amp;gt; r.status === 'issued').length
  if (issuedCount === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择已下发的策略')
    return
  }
  ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要批量暂停选中的 ${issuedCount} 个策略吗？`, '提示', {
    confirmButtonText: '确定',
    cancelButtonText: '取消',
    type: 'warning'
  }).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; {
      if (row.status === 'issued') {
        row.status = 'paused'
      }
    })
    ElMessage.success(`已成功暂停 ${issuedCount} 个策略`)
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {})
}

const handleSizeChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  pageSize.value = val
}

const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = val
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;

}

}

}

  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  padding: 15px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

}

  flex: 1;
}

.filter-bar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 15px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  padding: 15px;
  background: #fafafa;
  border-radius: 4px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.filter-input {
  width: 200px;

.filter-select {
  width: 150px;
}

.strategy-table {
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.pagination-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

  &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-25&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/StrategyManage.vue&lt;/h2&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/StrategyManage.vue&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;策略管理&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot;&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;

const isEdit = ref(false)

const currentStrategy = ref(null)

const form = reactive({
  name: '',
  type: 'time',
  action: 'on',
  brightness: 100,
  executeTime: '',
  repeatDays: [],
  latitude: 31.230416,
  longitude: 121.473701,
  sunEvent: 'sunset',
  offset: 0,
  interval: 30,
  startTime: '',
  endTime: '',
  startDate: '',
  endDate: '',
  devices: [],
  description: ''
})

const rules = {
  name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入策略名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择策略类型', trigger: 'change' }],
  action: [{ required: true, message: '请选择执行动作', trigger: 'change' }]
}

const getTypeText = (type) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { 'time': '时间执行', 'coordinate': '经纬度执行', 'timer': '计时执行' }
  return map[type] || type
}

const getTypeTag = (type) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { 'time': '', 'coordinate': 'success', 'timer': 'warning' }
  return map[type] || ''
}

const getActionText = (action) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { 'on': '开灯', 'off': '关灯', 'dim': '调光' }
  return map[action] || action
}

const getActionTag = (action) =&amp;gt; {
  const map = { 'on': 'success', 'off': 'warning', 'dim': '' }
  return map[action] || ''
}

const onTypeChange = () =&amp;gt; {
  form.action = 'on'
  form.brightness = 100
}

const showAddDialog = () =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  resetForm()
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const editStrategy = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  Object.assign(form, row)
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const viewDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  currentStrategy.value = row
  detailVisible.value = true
}

const deleteStrategy = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除策略&amp;quot;${row.name}&amp;quot;吗？`, '提示', {
    confirmButtonText: '确定',
    cancelButtonText: '取消',
    type: 'warning'
  }).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    const index = strategies.value.findIndex(s =&amp;gt; s.id === row.id)
    if (index &amp;gt; -1) {
      strategies.value.splice(index, 1)
      ElMessage.success('删除成功')
    }
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {})
}

const toggleStrategy = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessage.success(`策略&amp;quot;${row.name}&amp;quot;已${row.enabled ? '启用' : '禁用'}`)
}

const submitForm = () =&amp;gt; {
  formRef.value.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; {
    if (valid) {
      if (isEdit.value) {
        ElMessage.success('策略修改成功')
      } else {
        const newId = Math.max(...strategies.value.map(s =&amp;gt; s.id)) + 1
        strategies.value.push({
          id: newId,
          ...form,
          deviceCount: form.devices.length,
          enabled: true
        })
        ElMessage.success('策略创建成功')
      }
      dialogVisible.value = false
    }
  })
}

const resetForm = () =&amp;gt; {
  Object.assign(form, {
    name: '',
    type: 'time',
    action: 'on',
    brightness: 100,
    executeTime: '',
    repeatDays: [],
    latitude: 31.230416,
    longitude: 121.473701,
    sunEvent: 'sunset',
    offset: 0,
    interval: 30,
    startTime: '',
    endTime: '',
    startDate: '',
    endDate: '',
    devices: [],
    description: ''
  })
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;
.action-toolbar {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
}

.type-form {
  padding: 15px;
  background: #fafafa;
  border-radius: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
&amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;
&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt;

  &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-26&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/TimingStrategy.vue&lt;/h2&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/TimingStrategy.vue&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;时序策略&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addStrategy&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Plus&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          新增策略
        &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;strategyList&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;startTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;endTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;scope.row.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;enabled&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-switch 
            :value=&amp;quot;scope.row.enabled&amp;quot; 
            @change=&amp;quot;toggleEnable(scope.row)&amp;quot;
            active-color=&amp;quot;#13ce66&amp;quot;
            inactive-color=&amp;quot;#ff4949&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;createTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;创建时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editStrategy(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;deleteStrategy(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;

          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入策略名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;startTime&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-time-picker 
            v-model=&amp;quot;formData.startTime&amp;quot; 
            format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; 
            placeholder=&amp;quot;选择开始时间&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;

          &amp;lt;el-time-picker 
            v-model=&amp;quot;formData.endTime&amp;quot; 
            format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; 
            placeholder=&amp;quot;选择结束时间&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;亮度&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-slider 
            v-model=&amp;quot;formData.brightness&amp;quot; 
            :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; 
            :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; 
            :step=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot;
            show-input
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;dialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;saveStrategy&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Plus, Edit, Delete } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { timingStrategies } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Plus, Edit, Delete }
const strategyList = ref([...timingStrategies])
const dialogVisible = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const formData = ref({
  id: '',
  name: '',
  startTime: '',
  endTime: '',
  brightness: 80,
  enabled: true,
  createTime: ''
})

const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&amp;gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑策略' : '新增策略')

const addStrategy = () =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  formData.value = {
    id: '',
    name: '',
    startTime: '',
    endTime: '',
    brightness: 80,
    enabled: true,
    createTime: ''
  }
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const editStrategy = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  formData.value = { ...row }
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const deleteStrategy = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    '确定要删除该策略吗？',
    '提示',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    const index = strategyList.value.findIndex(s =&amp;gt; s.id === row.id)
    if (index &amp;gt; -1) {
      strategyList.value.splice(index, 1)
    }
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {
    ElMessage.info('已取消删除')
  })
}

const toggleEnable = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  row.enabled = !row.enabled
}

const saveStrategy = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.startTime || !formData.value.endTime) {
    ElMessage.warning('请填写完整信息')
    return
  }
  
  if (isEdit.value) {
    const index = strategyList.value.findIndex(s =&amp;gt; s.id === formData.value.id)
    if (index &amp;gt; -1) {
      strategyList.value[index] = { ...formData.value }
    }
    ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  } else {
    const newId = 'T' + String(strategyList.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0')
    strategyList.value.push({
      ...formData.value,
      id: newId,
      createTime: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
    })
    ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  }
  dialogVisible.value = false
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

.data-table {
  width: 100%;
}
&amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;

  showDetailDialog.value = true

  { id: 12, no: 12, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路1', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' },
  { id: 13, no: 13, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路2', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' },
  { id: 14, no: 14, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路3', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' },
  { id: 15, no: 15, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路4', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' }
])

total.value = circuits.value.length

const switchLogs = ref([
  { no: 1, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' },
  { no: 2, operator: 'operator', action: 'off', operateTime: '2026-05-14 06:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' },
  { no: 3, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-13 18:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' },
  { no: 4, operator: 'operator', action: 'off', operateTime: '2026-05-13 06:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' },
  { no: 5, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-12 18:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '手动操作' }
])

logTotal.value = switchLogs.value.length

const filteredCircuits = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  let result = circuits.value
  if (filters.product) result = result.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.deviceName.includes(filters.product))
  if (filters.networkStatus) result = result.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.networkStatus === filters.networkStatus)
  if (filters.switchStatus) result = result.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.switchStatus === filters.switchStatus)
  if (filters.search) result = result.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.circuitName.includes(filters.search) || c.moduleName.includes(filters.search))
  return result
})

const handleDeviceCheck = (data, checked) =&amp;gt; {
  console.log('Device checked:', data, checked)
}

const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value = selection
}

const searchCircuits = () =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const resetFilters = () =&amp;gt; {
  Object.assign(filters, { product: '', networkStatus: '', switchStatus: '', search: '' })
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const controlCircuit = (row, action) =&amp;gt; {
  if (row.networkStatus === 'offline') {
    ElMessage.warning('设备离线，无法操作')
    return
  }
  row.switchStatus = action
  const actionText = action === 'on' ? '打开' : '关闭'
  ElMessage.success(`${row.circuitName}已${actionText}`)
}

const batchControl = (action) =&amp;gt; {
  if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
    ElMessage.warning('请先选择要操作的回路')
    return
  }
  selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; {
    if (row.networkStatus === 'online') {
      row.switchStatus = action
    }
  })
  const actionText = action === 'on' ? '全开' : '全关'
  ElMessage.success(`已执行${actionText}`)
}

const viewSwitchLog = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  currentCircuit.value = row
  showLogDialog.value = true
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;selectedBox&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择配电箱&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;box-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-option v-for=&amp;quot;box in boxes&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;box.id&amp;quot; :label=&amp;quot;box.name&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;box.id&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;circuit-stats&amp;quot;&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Battery&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

          &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ totalEnergy }} kWh&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;总用电量&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;

      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

          &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;平均功率因数&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          {{ getBoxName(scope.row.boxId) }}
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;功率(W)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;energy&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;用电量(kWh)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;voltage&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;电压(V)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;current&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;电流(A)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;powerFactor&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;功率因数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;功率因数状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getPowerFactorTag(scope.row.powerFactor)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            {{ getPowerFactorText(scope.row.powerFactor) }}
          &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Lightning, Tools, Cpu } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { circuitData, distributionBoxes } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Electricity: Lightning, Battery: Tools, Gauge: Cpu }
const selectedBox = ref('')
const circuits = ref([...circuitData])
const boxes = ref([...distributionBoxes])

const filteredCircuits = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  if (!selectedBox.value) return circuits.value
  return circuits.value.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.boxId === selectedBox.value)
})

const totalPower = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&amp;gt; sum + c.power, 0) / 1000
})

const totalEnergy = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&amp;gt; sum + c.energy, 0)
})

const avgPowerFactor = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  const count = filteredCircuits.value.length
  if (count === 0) return 0
  return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&amp;gt; sum + c.powerFactor, 0) / count
})

const getBoxName = (boxId) =&amp;gt; {
  const box = boxes.value.find(b =&amp;gt; b.id === boxId)
  return box ? box.name : boxId
}

const getPowerFactorTag = (pf) =&amp;gt; {
  if (pf &amp;gt;= 0.95) return 'success'
  if (pf &amp;gt;= 0.9) return 'warning'
  return 'danger'
}

const getPowerFactorText = (pf) =&amp;gt; {
  if (pf &amp;gt;= 0.95) return '优秀'
  if (pf &amp;gt;= 0.9) return '良好'
  return '需优化'
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;
.circuit-stats {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.stat-card {
  flex: 1;
  background: #fff;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 15px;
}

.stat-icon {
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 24px;
}

.stat-info {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.stat-value {
  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #333;
}

.stat-label {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #666;
}

.box-select {
  width: 200px;
}

.data-table {
  width: 100%;
}

          layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, sizes, total&amp;quot;
