          &amp;lt;el-divider content-position=&amp;quot;left&amp;quot;&amp;gt;定时动作配置&amp;lt;/el-divider&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;timer-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;(action, index) in sceneForm.actions&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;index&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;10&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;动作类型&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;开灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;关灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-time-picker
                    v-model=&amp;quot;action.time&amp;quot;
                    placeholder=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot;
                    format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot;
                    value-format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot;
                    style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;
                  /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;11&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-checkbox-group v-model=&amp;quot;action.weekDays&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周一&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周二&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周三&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周四&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周五&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周六&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周日&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;/el-checkbox-group&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; icon=&amp;quot;Delete&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;removeAction(index)&amp;quot; circle size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; plain @click=&amp;quot;addAction&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt;+ 添加动作&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
        
        &amp;lt;!-- 光感场景配置 --&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template v-if=&amp;quot;sceneForm.type === 'light'&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-divider content-position=&amp;quot;left&amp;quot;&amp;gt;光感策略配置&amp;lt;/el-divider&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;光感阈值&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-input-number v-model=&amp;quot;sceneForm.lightThreshold&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;1000&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;光照阈值 (lux)&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;unit&amp;quot;&amp;gt;lux&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;触发动作&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;sceneForm.lightAction&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择触发动作&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;开灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;关灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;生效时段&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-time-picker
              v-model=&amp;quot;sceneForm.lightTimeRange&amp;quot;
              is-range
              placeholder=&amp;quot;开始时间 - 结束时间&amp;quot;
              format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot;
              value-format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot;
              range-separator=&amp;quot;至&amp;quot;
              start-placeholder=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot;
              end-placeholder=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot;
              style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;
            /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;el-divider content-position=&amp;quot;left&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关联设备&amp;lt;/el-divider&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;选择设备&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-transfer
            v-model=&amp;quot;sceneForm.devices&amp;quot;
            :data=&amp;quot;deviceOptions&amp;quot;
            :titles=&amp;quot;['可选设备', '已选设备']&amp;quot;
            filterable
            filter-placeholder=&amp;quot;搜索设备&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showSceneDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitScene&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;

    &amp;lt;!-- 详情弹窗 --&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;场景详情&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDetailDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot; v-if=&amp;quot;currentScene&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; border&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentScene.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;场景类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentScene.type === 'timer' ? 'primary' : 'success'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              {{ currentScene.type === 'timer' ? '定时场景' : '光感场景' }}
            &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentScene.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'info'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              {{ currentScene.status === 'active' ? '已启用' : '未启用' }}
            &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;创建人&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentScene.creator }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;创建时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentScene.createTime }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt;
        
        &amp;lt;el-divider content-position=&amp;quot;left&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;margin-top: 20px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;策略配置&amp;lt;/el-divider&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;currentScene.type === 'timer'&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;timer-detail&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;(action, index) in currentScene.actions&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;index&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-detail&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;action-no&amp;quot;&amp;gt;动作 {{ index + 1 }}：&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-tag size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ action.type === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}&amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;，执行时间：{{ action.time }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;，执行星期：{{ action.weekDaysText }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div v-else class=&amp;quot;light-detail&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div&amp;gt;光感阈值：{{ currentScene.lightThreshold }} lux&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div&amp;gt;触发动作：{{ currentScene.lightAction === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div&amp;gt;生效时段：{{ currentScene.lightTimeRange[0] }} 至 {{ currentScene.lightTimeRange[1] }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
import { Search, Plus, Delete, Clock, Sunrise, Download } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'

const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(10)
const total = ref(0)
const selectedRows = ref([])
const showSceneDialog = ref(false)
const showDetailDialog = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const currentScene = ref(null)
const sceneFormRef = ref(null)

const filters = reactive({
  name: '',
  type: ''
})

const weekDayMap = {
  '0': '周日',
  '1': '周一',
  '2': '周二',
  '3': '周三',
  '4': '周四',
  '5': '周五',
  '6': '周六'
}

const scenes = ref([
  {
    id: 1,
    no: 1,
    name: '夜间照明场景',
    type: 'timer',
    status: 'active',
    deployCount: 15,
    creator: '管理员',
    createTime: '2026-05-10 10:00:00',
    actions: [
      { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'] },
      { type: 'off', time: '06:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'] }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    no: 2,
    name: '周末照明场景',
    type: 'timer',
    status: 'active',
    deployCount: 8,
    creator: '管理员',
    createTime: '2026-05-12 14:30:00',
    actions: [
      { type: 'on', time: '19:00', weekDays: ['6', '0'] },
      { type: 'off', time: '07:00', weekDays: ['6', '0'] }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    no: 3,
    name: '阴天自动照明',
    type: 'light',
    status: 'inactive',
    deployCount: 5,
    creator: '管理员',
    createTime: '2026-05-13 09:00:00',
    lightThreshold: 200,
    lightAction: 'on',
    lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '20:00']
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    no: 4,
    name: '强光自动关闭',
    type: 'light',
    status: 'active',
    deployCount: 3,
    creator: '管理员',
    createTime: '2026-05-14 16:00:00',
    lightThreshold: 800,
    lightAction: 'off',
    lightTimeRange: ['08:00', '18:00']
  }
])

total.value = scenes.value.length

const deviceOptions = ref([
  { key: 1, label: '先导路集控1' },
  { key: 2, label: '先导路集控2' },
  { key: 3, label: '力唯中天集控1' },
  { key: 4, label: '力唯中天集控2' }
])

const sceneForm = reactive({
  name: '',
  type: 'timer',
  actions: [
    { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }
  ],
  lightThreshold: 200,
  lightAction: 'on',
  lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '22:00'],
  devices: []
})

const sceneRules = {
  name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入场景名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择场景类型', trigger: 'change' }]
}

const filteredScenes = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  let result = scenes.value
  if (filters.name) {
    result = result.filter(s =&amp;gt; s.name.includes(filters.name))
  }
  if (filters.type) {
    result = result.filter(s =&amp;gt; s.type === filters.type)
  }
  return result
})

const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value = selection
}

const searchScenes = () =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1
  ElMessage.success('查询成功')
}

const resetFilters = () =&amp;gt; {
  Object.assign(filters, { name: '', type: '' })
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  resetSceneForm()
  showSceneDialog.value = true
}

const handleLightSensor = () =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  resetSceneForm()
  sceneForm.type = 'light'
  showSceneDialog.value = true
}

const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  Object.assign(sceneForm, {
    name: row.name,
    type: row.type,
    actions: row.type === 'timer' ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(row.actions)) : [],
    lightThreshold: row.lightThreshold || 200,
    lightAction: row.lightAction || 'on',
    lightTimeRange: row.lightTimeRange || ['06:00', '22:00'],
    devices: []
  })
  showSceneDialog.value = true
}

const handleView = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  currentScene.value = {
    ...row,
    actions: row.actions ? row.actions.map(a =&amp;gt; ({
      ...a,
      weekDaysText: a.weekDays.map(d =&amp;gt; weekDayMap[d]).join('、')
    })) : []
  }
  showDetailDialog.value = true
}

const handleDeploy = () =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要下发选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个场景吗？`,
    '场景下发',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    ElMessage.success('场景下发成功')
  })
}

const handleDelete = () =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个场景吗？`,
    '删除确认',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  })
}

const handleDeleteOne = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    `确定要删除场景【${row.name}】吗？`,
    '删除确认',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  })
}

const submitScene = () =&amp;gt; {
  sceneFormRef.value.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; {
    if (valid) {
      if (sceneForm.type === 'timer' &amp;amp;&amp;amp; sceneForm.actions.length === 0) {
        ElMessage.warning('请至少添加一个定时动作')
        return
      }
      ElMessage.success(isEdit.value ? '编辑成功' : '创建成功')
      showSceneDialog.value = false
    }
  })
}

const addAction = () =&amp;gt; {
  sceneForm.actions.push({
    type: 'on',
    time: '18:00',
    weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0']
  })
}

const removeAction = (index) =&amp;gt; {
  if (sceneForm.actions.length &amp;gt; 1) {
    sceneForm.actions.splice(index, 1)
  } else {
    ElMessage.warning('至少保留一个动作')
  }
}

const handleTypeChange = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (sceneForm.type === 'timer') {
    sceneForm.actions = [{ type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }]
  }
}

const resetSceneForm = () =&amp;gt; {
  Object.assign(sceneForm, {
    name: '',
    type: 'timer',
    actions: [
      { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }
    ],
    lightThreshold: 200,
    lightAction: 'on',
    lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '22:00'],
    devices: []
  })
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;
.page-container {
  padding: 20px;
  background: #f0f2f5;
  min-height: 100%;
}

.toolbar {
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.filter-bar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 15px;
  padding: 15px;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.filter-select {
  width: 150px;
}

.filter-input {
  width: 200px;
}

.scene-table {
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
}

.pagination-wrapper {
  margin-top: 20px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.timer-actions {
  width: 100%;
}

.action-item {
  padding: 15px;
  background: #f5f7fa;
  border-radius: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.unit {
  margin-left: 10px;
  color: #606266;
}

.detail-content {
  padding: 10px 0;
}

.timer-detail,
.light-detail {
  padding: 15px;
  background: #f5f7fa;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.action-detail {
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.action-no {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #303133;
}

.action-detail span {
  margin-right: 10px;
}

  &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSave&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleCancel&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleTimeRange&amp;quot;&amp;gt;触发时间段&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;规则名称&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入规则名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;优先级&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.priority&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;高&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;high&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;低&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;low&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;执行日期&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;radio-group&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-radio v-model=&amp;quot;formData.executeType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;always&amp;quot;&amp;gt;一直执行&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-radio v-model=&amp;quot;formData.executeType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;scheduled&amp;quot;&amp;gt;定时执行&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;tabs-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;activeTab&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;section-tabs&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;触发条件&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;condition&amp;quot;&amp;gt;

    &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;触发时间段&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showTimeRangeDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;400px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;timeRangeData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;80px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;timeRangeData.startTime&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择开始时间&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;timeRangeData.endTime&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择结束时间&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;

      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showTimeRangeDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;confirmTimeRange&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref } from 'vue';
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue';

const activeTab = ref('condition');
const showTimeRangeDialog = ref(false);

const formData = ref({
  name: '',
  priority: 'high',
  executeType: 'always',
  conditions: [
    {
      productType: '',
      device: '',
      triggerType: '',
      triggerCondition: ''
    }
  ],
  actions: [
    {
      productType: '',
      device: '',
      action: ''
    }
  ]
});

const timeRangeData = ref({
  startTime: '',
  endTime: ''
});

const addCondition = () =&amp;gt; {
  formData.value.conditions.push({
    productType: '',
    device: '',
    triggerType: '',
    triggerCondition: ''
  });
};

const removeCondition = (index) =&amp;gt; {
  if (formData.value.conditions.length &amp;gt; 1) {
    formData.value.conditions.splice(index, 1);
  }
};

const addAction = () =&amp;gt; {
  formData.value.actions.push({
    productType: '',
    device: '',
    action: ''
  });
};

const removeAction = (index) =&amp;gt; {
  if (formData.value.actions.length &amp;gt; 1) {
    formData.value.actions.splice(index, 1);
  }
};

const handleSave = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name) {
    alert('请输入规则名称');
    return;
  }
  alert('规则保存成功');
};

const handleCancel = () =&amp;gt; {
  formData.value = {
    name: '',
    priority: 'high',
    executeType: 'always',
    conditions: [
      {
        productType: '',
        device: '',
        triggerType: '',
        triggerCondition: ''
      }
    ],
    actions: [
      {
        productType: '',
        device: '',
        action: ''
      }
    ]
  };
};

const handleTimeRange = () =&amp;gt; {
  showTimeRangeDialog.value = true;
};

const confirmTimeRange = () =&amp;gt; {
  showTimeRangeDialog.value = false;
  alert('触发时间段设置成功');
};
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

          &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;resultData.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            {{ resultData.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }}
          &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;详情&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ resultData.detail }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';

const activeTab = ref('control');
const filterKeyword = ref('');
const showAddDialog = ref(false);
const showResultDialog = ref(false);

const formData = ref({
  name: '',
  visible: true,
  sortOrder: 1
});

const resultData = ref({});

const scenesData = ref([
  { id: 1, name: '(0)应急开灯', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 2, name: '(0)某路段人工复查', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 3, name: '(1)线性灯-100', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 4, name: '(1)线性灯-10', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 5, name: '(1)线性灯-50', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 6, name: '(1)线性灯关', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 7, name: '(1)隧道灯具全关', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 8, name: '(2)高速灯-100', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 9, name: '(2)高速灯-50', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 10, name: '(2)高速灯-10', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 11, name: '(2)高速灯关', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 12, name: '(3)低位红光关闭', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 13, name: '(3)低位雾光关闭', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 14, name: '(3)低位雾光开', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 15, name: '(3)低位白光关闭', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 16, name: '(3)低位白光开', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 17, name: '(3)低位红光开', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 18, name: '(5)灯具展示100...', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 19, name: '(99)展厅一键全开', visible: true, selected: false },
  { id: 20, name: '(99)展厅全关', visible: true, selected: false }
]);

const recordsData = ref([
  { no: 1, sceneName: '应急开灯', executeTime: '2024-04-22 10:26:58', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制156盏灯具' },
  { no: 2, sceneName: '隧道灯具全关', executeTime: '2024-04-22 09:15:30', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制89盏灯具' },
  { no: 3, sceneName: '线性灯-50', executeTime: '2024-04-22 08:00:00', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制234盏灯具' },
  { no: 4, sceneName: '高速灯-100', executeTime: '2024-04-21 22:30:00', status: 'danger', detail: '执行失败，部分设备离线' }
]);

const filteredScenes = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  if (!filterKeyword.value) return scenesData.value;
  const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase();
  return scenesData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
});

const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; {};

const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; {
  filterKeyword.value = '';
};

const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true;
  formData.value = { name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: scenesData.value.length + 1 };
};

const handleConfirmAdd = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name) {
    alert('请输入场景名称');
    return;
  }
  scenesData.value.push({
    id: scenesData.value.length + 1,
    name: formData.value.name,
    visible: formData.value.visible,
    selected: false
  });
  showAddDialog.value = false;
};

const handleExecute = (scene) =&amp;gt; {
  alert(`正在执行场景：${scene.name}`);
};

const handleResult = (scene) =&amp;gt; {
  showResultDialog.value = true;
  resultData.value = {
    name: scene.name,
    executeTime: new Date().toLocaleString(),
    status: 'success',
    detail: '执行成功，共控制156盏灯具'
  };
};

const handleMore = (scene) =&amp;gt; {
  alert(`更多操作：${scene.name}`);
};

                &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;{{ rule.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/label&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-controls&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-switch v-model=&amp;quot;rule.enabled&amp;quot; active-text=&amp;quot;启用&amp;quot; inactive-text=&amp;quot;禁用&amp;quot; @change=&amp;quot;handleToggle(rule)&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-body&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;execute-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;执行日期:&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;{{ rule.executeDate }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleMore(rule)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;...&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-card&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;div v-else class=&amp;quot;list-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredRules&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;规则名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;priority&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;优先级&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.priority === 'high' ? 'danger' : 'info'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  {{ row.priority === 'high' ? '高' : '低' }}
                &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;enabled&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-switch v-model=&amp;quot;row.enabled&amp;quot; active-text=&amp;quot;启用&amp;quot; inactive-text=&amp;quot;禁用&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;executeDate&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行日期&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-pagination
            v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot;
            v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot;
            :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot;
            layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, total&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

    &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;新增规则&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;规则名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入规则名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;优先级&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.priority&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;高&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;high&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;低&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;low&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行日期&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.executeType&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;一直执行&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;always&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;定时执行&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;scheduled&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item v-if=&amp;quot;formData.executeType === 'scheduled'&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;formData.executeTime&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;datetime&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择执行时间&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirmAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue';

const viewMode = ref('card');
const filterKeyword = ref('');
const filterStatus = ref('');
const filterPriority = ref('');
const currentPage = ref(1);
const pageSize = ref(10);
const selectedRows = ref([]);
const showAddDialog = ref(false);

const formData = ref({
  name: '',
  priority: 'high',
  executeType: 'always',
  executeTime: ''
});

const rulesData = ref([
  { id: 1, no: 1, name: '检测有人开', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '2025.09.01-2028.10.31', selected: false },
  { id: 2, no: 2, name: '漏电自动断电', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false },
  { id: 3, no: 3, name: '光照度亮灯', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false },
  { id: 4, no: 4, name: '关回路', priority: 'low', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false },
  { id: 5, no: 5, name: '检测无人关', priority: 'low', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false }
]);

const total = computed(() =&amp;gt; rulesData.value.length);

const filteredRules = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  let data = [...rulesData.value];
  if (filterKeyword.value) {
    const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase();
    data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
  }
  if (filterStatus.value !== '') {
    const status = filterStatus.value === 'true';
    data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.enabled === status);
  }
  if (filterPriority.value) {
    data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.priority === filterPriority.value);
  }
  return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value);
});

const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1;
};

const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; {
  filterKeyword.value = '';
  filterStatus.value = '';
  filterPriority.value = '';
  currentPage.value = 1;
};

const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value = val;
};

const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true;
  formData.value = {
    name: '',
    priority: 'high',
    executeType: 'always',
    executeTime: ''
  };
};

const handleConfirmAdd = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name) {
    alert('请输入规则名称');
    return;
  }
  rulesData.value.push({
    id: rulesData.value.length + 1,
    no: rulesData.value.length + 1,
    name: formData.value.name,
    priority: formData.value.priority,
    enabled: true,
    executeDate: formData.value.executeType === 'always' ? '一直执行' : formData.value.executeTime,
    selected: false
  });
  showAddDialog.value = false;
};

const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  alert(`编辑规则：${row.name}`);
};

const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  const index = rulesData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.id === row.id);
  if (index !== -1) {
    rulesData.value.splice(index, 1);
  }
};

const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; {
    const index = rulesData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.id === row.id);
    if (index !== -1) {
      rulesData.value.splice(index, 1);
    }
  });
  selectedRows.value = [];
};

const handleToggle = (rule) =&amp;gt; {
  alert(`${rule.name}已${rule.enabled ? '启用' : '禁用'}`);
};

const handleMore = (rule) =&amp;gt; {
  alert(`更多操作：${rule.name}`);
};
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;
.page-container {
  display: flex;
  height: calc(100vh - 60px);
}

.main-content {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.right-content {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 15px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

  &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSave&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleCancel&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;场景名称&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入场景名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;显示状态&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.visible&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;显示&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;隐藏&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;排序序号&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-input type=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;formData.sortOrder&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入排序序号&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;动作配置&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addAction&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Plus /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-list&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;(action, index) in formData.actions&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;index&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-index&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ index + 1 }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-fields&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.productType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择产品类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯控制器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯控制器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;集控&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;集控&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;传感器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;传感器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;摄像头&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;摄像头&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;智能主控&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;智能主控&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;智能主控-站点&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;智能主控-站点&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.device&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择设备&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;delay-group&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-input type=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;action.delay&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入延时时长&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;delay-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.delayUnit&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;delay-unit&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;秒&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;秒&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;分&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;分&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                    &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;时&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;时&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.action&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择动作内容&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;开灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;开灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;关灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;关灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;调光50%&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;调光50%&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                  &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;调光100%&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;调光100%&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-controls&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-button v-if=&amp;quot;index &amp;gt; 0&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;moveUp(index)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;↑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-button v-if=&amp;quot;index &amp;lt; formData.actions.length - 1&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;moveDown(index)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;↓&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
                &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;removeAction(index)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;×&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref } from 'vue';
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue';

const formData = ref({
  name: '',
  visible: true,
  sortOrder: 1,
  actions: [
    {
      productType: '',
      device: '',
      delay: '',
      delayUnit: '秒',
      action: ''
    }
  ]
});

const addAction = () =&amp;gt; {
  formData.value.actions.push({
    productType: '',
    device: '',
    delay: '',
    delayUnit: '秒',
    action: ''
  });
};

const removeAction = (index) =&amp;gt; {
  if (formData.value.actions.length &amp;gt; 1) {
    formData.value.actions.splice(index, 1);
  }
};

const moveUp = (index) =&amp;gt; {
  if (index &amp;gt; 0) {
    const temp = formData.value.actions[index];
    formData.value.actions[index] = formData.value.actions[index - 1];
    formData.value.actions[index - 1] = temp;
  }
};

const moveDown = (index) =&amp;gt; {
  if (index &amp;lt; formData.value.actions.length - 1) {
    const temp = formData.value.actions[index];
    formData.value.actions[index] = formData.value.actions[index + 1];
    formData.value.actions[index + 1] = temp;
  }
};

const handleSave = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name) {
    alert('请输入场景名称');
    return;
  }
  alert('场景保存成功');
};

const handleCancel = () =&amp;gt; {
  formData.value = {
    name: '',
    visible: true,
    sortOrder: 1,
    actions: [
      {
        productType: '',
        device: '',
        delay: '',
        delayUnit: '秒',
        action: ''
      }
    ]
  };
};
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

  &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-42&quot;&gt;src/views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue&lt;/h2&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;定时场景管理&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addSchedule&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Plus&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          新增定时
        &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;schedules&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;schedule-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;定时编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;定时名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;templateName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;关联场景&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;scheduleType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getTypeTagType(scope.row.scheduleType)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            {{ getTypeText(scope.row.scheduleType) }}
          &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;enabled&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-switch 
            :value=&amp;quot;scope.row.enabled&amp;quot; 
            @change=&amp;quot;toggleEnable(scope.row)&amp;quot;
            active-color=&amp;quot;#13ce66&amp;quot;
            inactive-color=&amp;quot;#ff4949&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editSchedule(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;deleteSchedule(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;el-dialog :title=&amp;quot;editDialogTitle&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;dialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;定时名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入定时名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;关联场景&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;templateId&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.templateId&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择场景&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option 
              v-for=&amp;quot;template in enabledTemplates&amp;quot; 
              :key=&amp;quot;template.id&amp;quot; 
              :label=&amp;quot;template.name&amp;quot; 
              :value=&amp;quot;template.id&amp;quot; 
            /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;scheduleType&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.scheduleType&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;每天&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;daily&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;周末&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;weekend&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;节假日&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;holiday&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-time-picker 
            v-model=&amp;quot;formData.time&amp;quot; 
            format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; 
            placeholder=&amp;quot;选择执行时间&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;dialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;saveSchedule&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { scheduledScenes, sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Plus }
const schedules = ref([...scheduledScenes])
const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates])
const dialogVisible = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const formData = ref({
  id: '',
  name: '',
  templateId: '',
  scheduleType: 'daily',
  time: '',
  enabled: true
})

const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&amp;gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑定时场景' : '新增定时场景')

const enabledTemplates = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  return templates.value.filter(t =&amp;gt; t.enabled)
})

const schedulesWithTemplateName = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  return schedules.value.map(s =&amp;gt; {
    const template = templates.value.find(t =&amp;gt; t.id === s.templateId)
    return {
      ...s,
      templateName: template ? template.name : '未知场景'
    }
  })
})

const getTypeTagType = (type) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (type) {
    case 'daily': return 'success'
    case 'weekend': return 'warning'
    case 'holiday': return 'info'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getTypeText = (type) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (type) {
    case 'daily': return '每天'
    case 'weekend': return '周末'
    case 'holiday': return '节假日'
    default: return type
  }
}

const addSchedule = () =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  formData.value = {
    id: '',
    name: '',
    templateId: '',
    scheduleType: 'daily',
    time: '',
    enabled: true
  }
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const editSchedule = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  formData.value = { ...row }
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const deleteSchedule = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    '确定要删除该定时任务吗？',
    '提示',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    const index = schedules.value.findIndex(s =&amp;gt; s.id === row.id)
    if (index &amp;gt; -1) {
      schedules.value.splice(index, 1)
    }
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {
    ElMessage.info('已取消删除')
  })
}

const toggleEnable = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  row.enabled = !row.enabled
}

const saveSchedule = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.templateId || !formData.value.time) {
    ElMessage.warning('请填写完整信息')
    return
  }
  
  if (isEdit.value) {
    const index = schedules.value.findIndex(s =&amp;gt; s.id === formData.value.id)
    if (index &amp;gt; -1) {
      schedules.value[index] = { ...formData.value }
    }
    ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  } else {
    const newId = 'SCH' + String(schedules.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0')
    schedules.value.push({
      ...formData.value,
      id: newId
    })
    ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  }
  dialogVisible.value = false
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;
.schedule-table {
  width: 100%;
}
&amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;
&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt;

  &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-43&quot;&gt;src/views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue&lt;/h2&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;场景模板配置&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addTemplate&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Plus&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          新增模板
        &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;

        v-for=&amp;quot;template in templates&amp;quot; 
        :key=&amp;quot;template.id&amp;quot;
        :class=&amp;quot;['template-card', { disabled: !template.enabled }]&amp;quot;
      &amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;template-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;template-name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ template.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-switch 
            :value=&amp;quot;template.enabled&amp;quot; 
            @change=&amp;quot;toggleEnable(template)&amp;quot;
            active-color=&amp;quot;#13ce66&amp;quot;
            inactive-color=&amp;quot;#ff4949&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;p class=&amp;quot;template-desc&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ template.description }}&amp;lt;/p&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;template-config&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;config-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;config-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮度&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;template.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;template.duration&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;config-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;config-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;时段&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;config-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ template.duration }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;template-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editTemplate(template)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;deleteTemplate(template)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;el-dialog :title=&amp;quot;editDialogTitle&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;dialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入场景名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;场景描述&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;description&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-textarea v-model=&amp;quot;formData.description&amp;quot; rows=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入场景描述&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;formData.brightness&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; :step=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;定时时段&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.duration&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;如: 02:00-05:00，为空则全天生效&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;dialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;saveTemplate&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Plus }
const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates])
const dialogVisible = ref(false)
const isEdit = ref(false)
const formData = ref({
  id: '',
  name: '',
  description: '',
  brightness: 80,
  duration: '',
  enabled: true
})

const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&amp;gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑场景模板' : '新增场景模板')

const addTemplate = () =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = false
  formData.value = {
    id: '',
    name: '',
    description: '',
    brightness: 80,
    duration: '',
    enabled: true
  }
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const editTemplate = (template) =&amp;gt; {
  isEdit.value = true
  formData.value = { ...template }
  dialogVisible.value = true
}

const deleteTemplate = (template) =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    '确定要删除该场景模板吗？',
    '提示',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'warning'
    }
  ).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    const index = templates.value.findIndex(t =&amp;gt; t.id === template.id)
    if (index &amp;gt; -1) {
      templates.value.splice(index, 1)
    }
    ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {
    ElMessage.info('已取消删除')
  })
}

const toggleEnable = (template) =&amp;gt; {
  template.enabled = !template.enabled
}

const saveTemplate = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.name) {
    ElMessage.warning('请填写场景名称')
    return
  }
  
  if (isEdit.value) {
    const index = templates.value.findIndex(t =&amp;gt; t.id === formData.value.id)
    if (index &amp;gt; -1) {
      templates.value[index] = { ...formData.value }
    }
    ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  } else {
    const newId = 'S' + String(templates.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0')
    templates.value.push({
      ...formData.value,
      id: newId
    })
    ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  }
  dialogVisible.value = false
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

  &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-44&quot;&gt;src/views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue&lt;/h2&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;一键场景触发&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;refreshStatus&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Refresh&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          刷新状态
        &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;trigger-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;快速触发&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;quick-triggers&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div 
          v-for=&amp;quot;template in enabledTemplates&amp;quot; 
          :key=&amp;quot;template.id&amp;quot;
          class=&amp;quot;trigger-card&amp;quot;
          @click=&amp;quot;triggerScene(template)&amp;quot;
        &amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;trigger-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Lightbulb&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;trigger-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;trigger-name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ template.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;trigger-brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮度: {{ template.brightness }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;触发&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;trigger-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;当前场景状态&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;current-scene&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;scene-status&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentScene ? 'success' : 'info'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;large&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            {{ currentScene ? '场景运行中: ' + currentScene.name : '无场景运行' }}
          &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;currentScene&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;scene-detail&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;detail-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮度设置&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;currentScene.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;detail-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;启动时间&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;detail-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentScene.startTime }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;stopScene&amp;quot;&amp;gt;停止场景&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;trigger-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;触发历史记录&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;triggerHistory&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;history-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;触发时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;sceneName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;operator&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;操作人&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;scope.row.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              {{ scope.row.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }}
            &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;场景触发确认&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;confirmDialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;400px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;confirm-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;p&amp;gt;确认触发场景:&amp;lt;/p&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;p class=&amp;quot;scene-name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ pendingScene?.name }}&amp;lt;/p&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;p class=&amp;quot;scene-desc&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ pendingScene?.description }}&amp;lt;/p&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;confirmDialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;confirmTrigger&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确认触发&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Refresh, Sunrise } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData'

const icons = { Refresh, Lightbulb: Sunrise }
const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates])
const confirmDialogVisible = ref(false)
const pendingScene = ref(null)
const currentScene = ref(null)

const triggerHistory = ref([
  { id: 1, time: '2024-01-15 14:30:22', sceneName: '节能模式', brightness: 50, operator: '管理员', status: 'success' },
  { id: 2, time: '2024-01-15 10:15:33', sceneName: '节日庆典模式', brightness: 100, operator: '张三', status: 'success' },
  { id: 3, time: '2024-01-14 22:00:00', sceneName: '深夜模式', brightness: 30, operator: '系统自动', status: 'success' },
  { id: 4, time: '2024-01-14 18:30:00', sceneName: '日常照明策略', brightness: 100, operator: '系统自动', status: 'success' },
  { id: 5, time: '2024-01-13 14:20:00', sceneName: '雾霾模式', brightness: 90, operator: '李四', status: 'success' }
])

const enabledTemplates = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  return templates.value.filter(t =&amp;gt; t.enabled)
})

const triggerScene = (template) =&amp;gt; {
  pendingScene.value = template
  confirmDialogVisible.value = true
}

const confirmTrigger = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (pendingScene.value) {
    currentScene.value = {
      ...pendingScene.value,
      startTime: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN')
    }
    triggerHistory.value.unshift({
      id: Date.now(),
      time: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN'),
      sceneName: pendingScene.value.name,
      brightness: pendingScene.value.brightness,
      operator: '管理员',
      status: 'success'
    })
    ElMessage.success('场景触发成功')
  }
  confirmDialogVisible.value = false
}

const stopScene = () =&amp;gt; {
  currentScene.value = null
  ElMessage.info('场景已停止')
}

const refreshStatus = () =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessage.success('状态已刷新')
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;
.trigger-section {
  margin-bottom: 25px;

  background: #fff;

  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s;
  
  &amp;amp;:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  padding: 20px;

  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);

.scene-detail {

  border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
}

.detail-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  
  &amp;amp;:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
  }
}

  width: 100px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #666;
}

  font-size: 14px;

}

        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*工单类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;workOrderType&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.workOrderType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择工单类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;爱克园区巡检&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;爱克园区巡检&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯具故障模板&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯具故障模板&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;巡检模板&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;巡检模板&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;-&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;-&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;dialog-footer&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'

const showAddDialog = ref(false)
const filterDeviceType = ref('')
const filterStatus = ref('')
const selectedRows = ref([])
const currentPage = ref(1)
const pageSize = ref(15)

const mockData = ref([
  {
    no: 1,
    levelName: '力唯中天产业园',
    deviceType: '集控',
    alarmType: '设备掉电告警,设备离线告警',
    workOrderType: '灯具故障模板',
    status: '启用'
  },
  {
    no: 2,
    levelName: '力唯中天产业园',
    deviceType: '集控',
    alarmType: '设备掉电告警,设备离线告警',
    workOrderType: '灯具故障模板',
    status: '启用'
  },
  {
    no: 3,
    levelName: '园区道路',
    deviceType: '灯具',
    alarmType: '灯具调光异常',
    workOrderType: '巡检模板',
    status: '启用'
  },
  {
    no: 4,
    levelName: '力唯中天产业园',
    deviceType: '集控',
    alarmType: '设备离线告警',
    workOrderType: '巡检模板',
    status: '关闭'
  },
  {
    no: 5,
    levelName: '力唯中天产业园',
    deviceType: '单灯控制器',
    alarmType: '信号强度,离线告警,欠压告警',
    workOrderType: '巡检模板',
    status: '关闭'
  },
  {
    no: 6,
    levelName: '力唯中天产业园',
    deviceType: '单灯控制器',
    alarmType: '信号强度,离线告警,欠压告警',
    workOrderType: '巡检模板',
    status: '关闭'
  },
  {
    no: 7,
    levelName: '充电桩区域',
    deviceType: '灯具',
    alarmType: '非计划异常亮灯,灯具调光异常',
    workOrderType: '-',
    status: '关闭'
  }
])

const total = computed(() =&amp;gt; mockData.value.length)

const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  let result = mockData.value
  if (filterDeviceType.value) {
    result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.deviceType === filterDeviceType.value)
  }
  if (filterStatus.value) {
    result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.status === filterStatus.value)
  }
  return result
})

const formData = ref({
  levelName: '',
  deviceType: '',
  alarmType: [],
  workOrderType: ''
})

const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true
  formData.value = {
    levelName: '',
    deviceType: '',
    alarmType: [],
    workOrderType: ''
  }
}

const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; {
  filterDeviceType.value = ''
  filterStatus.value = ''
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value = val
}

const handleToggleStatus = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  row.status = row.status === '启用' ? '关闭' : '启用'
}

const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true
  formData.value = {
    levelName: row.levelName,
    deviceType: row.deviceType,
    alarmType: row.alarmType.split(','),
    workOrderType: row.workOrderType
  }
}

const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no)
  if (index !== -1) {
    mockData.value.splice(index, 1)
  }
}

const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; {
    const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no)
    if (index !== -1) {
      mockData.value.splice(index, 1)
    }
  })
  selectedRows.value = []
}

const handleConfirm = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.levelName || !formData.value.deviceType || !formData.value.alarmType.length || !formData.value.workOrderType) {
    alert('请填写所有必填字段')
    return
  }
  const newRecord = {
    no: mockData.value.length + 1,
    levelName: formData.value.levelName,
    deviceType: formData.value.deviceType,
    alarmType: formData.value.alarmType.join(','),
    workOrderType: formData.value.workOrderType,
    status: '启用'
  }
  mockData.value.push(newRecord)
  showAddDialog.value = false
}

const handleSizeChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  pageSize.value = val
  currentPage.value = 1
}

const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  currentPage.value = val
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;

}

  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  padding-bottom: 15px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
}

.header-right {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
}

.filter-bar {
  display: flex;
  gap: 15px;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.filter-select {
  width: 180px;
}

.table-wrapper {
  flex: 1;
  overflow: auto;
  min-height: 0;
}

.data-table {
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 1200px;
}

.pagination-bar {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 15px 0;
}

.form-container {
  padding: 10px 0;
}

.form-select {
  width: 100%;
}

.dialog-footer {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 15px;
}

  &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/workorder/WorkOrderCreate.vue&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新建工单&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;

      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;基本信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;工单类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; required&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择工单类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;故障工单&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;fault&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;维修工单&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;maintenance&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;工单标题&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot; required&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.title&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入工单标题&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;详细描述&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;description&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-textarea v-model=&amp;quot;formData.description&amp;quot; rows=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入详细描述&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;位置信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;地点&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;location&amp;quot; required&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.location&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入地点&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;优先级&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;优先级&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;priority&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.priority&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;高&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;high&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;中&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;medium&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;低&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;low&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/workorder/list&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitForm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;提交&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'

const router = useRouter()
const formData = ref({
  type: '',
  title: '',
  description: '',
  location: '',
  priority: 'medium',
  status: 'pending',
  assignee: '',
  createTime: '',
  updateTime: ''
})

const generateId = () =&amp;gt; {
  const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase()
  return 'WO' + timestamp.slice(-3) + String(Math.random()).slice(-3).toUpperCase()
}

const submitForm = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.type || !formData.value.title || !formData.value.location) {
    ElMessage.warning('请填写必填项')
    return
  }
  
  const now = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN')
  formData.value.id = generateId()
  formData.value.createTime = now
  formData.value.updateTime = now
  
  ElMessage.success('工单创建成功')
  router.push('/workorder/list')
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;
.workorder-form {
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.form-section {
  margin-bottom: 25px;
  padding: 20px;
  background: #fafafa;
  border-radius: 8px;
}

.section-title {
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  color: #333;
}

.form-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 15px;
  justify-content: center;
  padding-top: 20px;
}
&amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;

          &amp;lt;el-timeline-item timestamp=&amp;quot;创建&amp;quot;&amp;gt;工单已创建，等待处理&amp;lt;/el-timeline-item&amp;gt;

      &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;assignForm&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;80px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;

        &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;confirmAssign&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确认派发&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue'
import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router'
import { workOrders } from '@/data/mockData'

const route = useRoute()
const router = useRouter()
const order = ref(null)
const assignDialogVisible = ref(false)
const assignForm = ref({ assignee: '' })

onMounted(() =&amp;gt; {
  const id = route.params.id
  order.value = workOrders.find(w =&amp;gt; w.id === id) || workOrders[0]
})

const getPriorityTagType = (priority) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (priority) {
    case 'high': return 'danger'
    case 'medium': return 'warning'
    case 'low': return 'success'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getPriorityText = (priority) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (priority) {
    case 'high': return '高'
    case 'medium': return '中'
    case 'low': return '低'
    default: return priority
  }
}

const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'pending': return 'warning'
    case 'processing': return 'primary'
    case 'completed': return 'success'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'pending': return '待处理'
    case 'processing': return '处理中'
    case 'completed': return '已完成'
    default: return status
  }
}

const handleAssign = () =&amp;gt; {
  assignForm.value = { assignee: '' }
  assignDialogVisible.value = true
}

const confirmAssign = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!assignForm.value.assignee) {
    ElMessage.warning('请选择处理人员')
    return
  }
  
  if (order.value) {
    order.value.assignee = assignForm.value.assignee
    order.value.status = 'processing'
    order.value.updateTime = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN')
  }
  ElMessage.success('派发成功')
  assignDialogVisible.value = false
}

const handleComplete = () =&amp;gt; {
  ElMessageBox.confirm(
    '确定要完成此工单吗？',
    '提示',
    {
      confirmButtonText: '确定',
      cancelButtonText: '取消',
      type: 'success'
    }
  ).then(() =&amp;gt; {
    if (order.value) {
      order.value.status = 'completed'
      order.value.updateTime = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN')
    }
    ElMessage.success('工单已完成')
  }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {
    ElMessage.info('已取消')
  })
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt;

  margin-bottom: 25px;
  padding: 20px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: #fff;
}

  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

  margin: 0 0 10px 0;
  font-size: 24px;

  gap: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 25px;
}
