  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);

    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }
}

  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
  color: #333;
}

  line-height: 1.6;
  color: #666;
}

  background: #fff;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.timeline-title {
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  color: #333;
}

.detail-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 15px;
  justify-content: center;
}

        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*工单类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择工单类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;爱克园区巡检&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;爱克园区巡检&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;11月6号灯具故障模板&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;11月6号灯具故障模板&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯具故障模板&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯具故障模板&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;单灯故障自动派单&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;单灯故障自动派单&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;巡检模板&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;巡检模板&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*工单名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;数字输入框&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-input-number v-model=&amp;quot;formData.number&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;9999&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;日期范围&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;dateRange&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-date-picker
            v-model=&amp;quot;formData.dateRange&amp;quot;
            type=&amp;quot;daterange&amp;quot;
            range-separator=&amp;quot;至&amp;quot;
            start-placeholder=&amp;quot;开始日期&amp;quot;
            end-placeholder=&amp;quot;结束日期&amp;quot;
            class=&amp;quot;form-date&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;时间范围&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;timeRange&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-time-picker
            v-model=&amp;quot;formData.timeRange&amp;quot;
            is-range
            range-separator=&amp;quot;至&amp;quot;
            start-placeholder=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot;
            end-placeholder=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot;
            class=&amp;quot;form-time&amp;quot;
          /&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;图片上传&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;images&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-upload
            class=&amp;quot;image-uploader&amp;quot;
            action=&amp;quot;#&amp;quot;
            :show-file-list=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot;
            :auto-upload=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot;
          &amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;upload-placeholder&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
              &amp;lt;el-icon class=&amp;quot;upload-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Plus /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/el-upload&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;dialog-footer&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
        &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt;
  &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt;

&amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'

const showAddDialog = ref(false)
const currentStatus = ref('pending')
const filterKeyword = ref('')
const selectedRows = ref([])

const mockData = ref([
  {
    no: 1,
    name: '园区路灯巡检',
    type: '爱克园区巡检',
    creator: '管理员',
    isTimeout: false,
    status: 'pending',
    createTime: '2024-05-15 09:30:00'
  },
  {
    no: 2,
    name: '灯具故障维修',
    type: '灯具故障模板',
    creator: '张三',
    isTimeout: true,
    status: 'processing',
    createTime: '2024-05-14 14:20:00'
  }
])

const statusTabs = computed(() =&amp;gt; [
  { label: '待处理', value: 'pending', count: mockData.value.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.status === 'pending').length },
  { label: '我发起的', value: 'created', count: 2 },
  { label: '已处理的', value: 'processed', count: 0 },
  { label: '抄送我的', value: 'copied', count: 0 },
  { label: '全部工单', value: 'all', count: mockData.value.length }
])

const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; {
  let result = mockData.value
  if (currentStatus.value !== 'all') {
    if (currentStatus.value === 'pending') {
      result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.status === 'pending')
    } else if (currentStatus.value === 'created') {
      result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.creator === '管理员')
    } else if (currentStatus.value === 'processed') {
      result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.status === 'completed')
    }
  }
  if (filterKeyword.value) {
    result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.name.includes(filterKeyword.value))
  }
  return result
})

const formData = ref({
  type: '',
  name: '',
  number: 0,
  dateRange: [],
  timeRange: [],
  images: []
})

const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'pending': return 'warning'
    case 'processing': return 'primary'
    case 'completed': return 'success'
    default: return 'info'
  }
}

const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; {
  switch (status) {
    case 'pending': return '待处理'
    case 'processing': return '处理中'
    case 'completed': return '已完成'
    default: return status
  }
}

const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; {
  showAddDialog.value = true
  formData.value = {
    type: '',
    name: '',
    number: 0,
    dateRange: [],
    timeRange: [],
    images: []
  }
}

const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; {}

const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; {
  filterKeyword.value = ''
}

const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value = val
}

const handleDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; {}
const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; {}
const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; {
  const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no)
  if (index !== -1) {
    mockData.value.splice(index, 1)
  }
}
const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; {
  selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; {
    const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no)
    if (index !== -1) {
      mockData.value.splice(index, 1)
    }
  })
  selectedRows.value = []
}

const handleConfirm = () =&amp;gt; {
  if (!formData.value.type || !formData.value.name) {
    alert('请填写必填字段')
    return
  }
  const newRecord = {
    no: mockData.value.length + 1,
    name: formData.value.name,
    type: formData.value.type,
    creator: '管理员',
    isTimeout: false,
    status: 'pending',
    createTime: new Date().toLocaleString()
  }
  mockData.value.push(newRecord)
  showAddDialog.value = false
}
&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;

  &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-49&quot;&gt;update-hierarchy.js&lt;/h2&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: update-hierarchy.js&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;import fs from 'fs/promises';
import path from 'path';

// 需要更新的文件列表
const files = [
  './src/views/device/LampPostManage.vue',
  './src/views/power/CircuitGroup.vue',
  './src/views/power/LineInfo.vue',
  './src/views/power/CircuitControl.vue',
  './src/views/power/CentralControl.vue',
  './src/views/power/DistributionBox.vue',
  './src/views/lighting/LampManage.vue',
  './src/views/lighting/GroupManage.vue',
  './src/views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue',
  './src/views/lighting/HistoryStrategy.vue'
];

// 替换规则
const replacements = [
  { from: /爱克股份产业园/g, to: '长沙' },
  { from: /园区地面/g, to: '岳麓区' },
  { from: /1栋地面/g, to: '先导路' },
  { from: /1栋/g, to: '力唯中天1栋' },
  { from: /4栋/g, to: '力唯中天2栋' },
  { from: /园区290/g, to: '岳麓区290号' },
  { from: /展厅集控/g, to: '先导路集控' }
];

async function updateFiles() {
  for (const filePath of files) {
    const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), filePath);
    
    try {
      const content = await fs.readFile(fullPath, 'utf8');
      
      // 应用所有替换规则
      let newContent = content;
      replacements.forEach(replace =&amp;gt; {
        newContent = newContent.replace(replace.from, replace.to);
      });
      
      await fs.writeFile(fullPath, newContent, 'utf8');
      console.log(`✅ 更新成功: ${filePath}`);
    } catch (error) {
      console.log(`❌ 文件不存在或读取失败: ${filePath}`);
    }
  }
  
  console.log('\n🎉 所有层级数据已更新完成！');
}

updateFiles();
&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt;

import vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue'
import { resolve } from 'path'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [vue()],
  resolve: {
    alias: {
      '@': resolve(__dirname, 'src')
    }
  }
})
